title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
Development at Nolimit City (part of Evolution AB) is a challenging and exciting role where you will be part of a team dedicated to creating solutions that redefine our industry. By working in small, highly collaborative teams, you and your team will have clear ownership of one of our most important new initiatives.
   

  

 At Nolimit City, we optimize for quality, fast flows, and iterative development with short feedback loops. We have a strong focus on end-to-end ownership, continuous improvement, monitoring, and experimentation. We strive to have teams that are inclusive, helpful, and have a strong sense of ownership for what they build. Our engineers make some of the most significant decisions for the company, and we are looking for open and curious developers. As part of the Nolimit City team, you will be part of one of Sweden's fastest-growing companies and contribute to creating value for our players worldwide.
   

  

 We are expanding several of our engineering teams, including the team working on new initiatives with innovative products for our end users and work on our core products.
   

  

 Although we prefer that you're working on-site we also undertand that you have a life outside of work, meaning that working remote from time to time, leaving early, coming in late etc is not something unusual for us. A bit of a cliche; but we do in fact offer a great deal of freedom but with that comes responsibility.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Own the product from start to finish. Decide how it is best built, tested, deployed, and monitored.
* Work with large-scale, highly available, and robust modern systems.
* Be an integral part of a team and its culture and ways of working.
* Work with automated deployment enabling release multiple times a day.
* Succeed, fail, and learn together with other competent and talented people. We believe in an environment that offers growth opportunities and see education as a result of failure that brings us closer to the next breakthrough.
* Take responsibility for system design, work together with domain architects, own end-to-end problems, manage stakeholder communication, and mentor junior engineers.


 Who you are
   

  

* Tech stack should include: JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java.
* Experience with advanced JavaScript libraries and frameworks
* Experience with APIs and product development
* A passion for writing clear and sustainable code
* Experience with agile methodologies, continuous integration, continuous delivery
* Good spoken and written English skills
* You thrive in an environment where you are responsible for your code and takes ownership of the change from editor to production system
* We understand that you might not have experience in all the areas listed above, but as long as you have the ambition and willingness to learn we would like to hear from you.


 Some of our technologies
   

  

* Javascript / TypeScript
* React / NextJS
* Redux / Redux-Toolkit Query
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Node.js and Express.js
* Java 17, Dropwizard
* MySQL
* PostgreSQL
* AWS, Ubuntu, Docker, GitHub Actions


 Who we are
   

  

 We are the best and fastest growing slot provider in the world with the operator and product in focus, and the mobile future on our minds. Nolimit is a team of experienced professionals from the gambling industry in Stockholm, Sweden, Malta and Gurugram, India. Our company has derived from hands on work at some of the most successful gambling software providers and operators over the last 15 years. Our mission is to offer a fast, reliable and flexible team that cooperates with the best operators in the world, taking gambling to the next level.
   

  

 We have a clean code high performance modern mini/micro service portable system platform for mobile and desktop that is 100 % under our own control. Since we have our own platform, this allows us to deliver special features and smooth, customizable marketing campaigns that are tailored to the operator's specific needs. We think it's time for a new angle to the gambling software industry – one where the product is in focus and we fully engage their promotion, marketing and country manager system/activities with our games. Nolimit work with customers on a global scale and the largest gambling operators in the world have our games everywhere.
   

  

 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
   

  

 Send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
   

  

 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: Graduate Software Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The SW Engineer is responsible for conducting, planning, or overseeing one or more aspects of the analysis, design, programming, debugging, and modification of computer programs for commercial or end user applications. This role involves writing code, completing programming tasks, and performing testing and debugging of applications. The SW Engineer also completes documentation and procedures for installation and maintenance, and may interface with users to define system requirements and/or necessary modifications or develop cost estimates, budgets, and schedules.
   

  

 All roles require digital fluency, including the ability to work with emerging technologies such as Generative AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot) to support everyday work.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Conduct analysis, design, programming, debugging, and modification of computer programs for commercial or end user applications.
* Write code, complete programming tasks, and perform testing and debugging of applications.
* Complete documentation and procedures for installation and maintenance.
* Interface with users to define system requirements and/or necessary modifications.
* Develop cost estimates, budgets, and schedules as needed.


 Visa requires at least 3 days in office, expectations of these days will be confirmed by your Hiring Manager.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Basic Qualifications
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree OR relevant work experience.
* Experience in analysis, design, and programming of computer applications.
* Experience in debugging and modifying software programs.
* Experience in writing and maintaining technical documentation.
* Experience in performing software testing and troubleshooting.
* Experience in collaborating with users or stakeholders to gather requirements.
* Experience in developing or supporting installation and maintenance procedures.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in developing cost estimates, budgets, or schedules for software projects.
* Experience in supporting commercial or end user applications.
* Experience in working with cross-functional teams.


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Fullstack Developer
description:
Vi är ett litet, hårt arbetande team som bygger en produkt som över 300 000 elever och lärare runt om i världen är beroende av varje dag. Vi rör oss snabbt, tänker stort och ställer höga krav på varandra och oss själva. Om det låter krävande är det här inte rätt plats för dig. Om det låter som precis där du vill vara, då är du den utvecklare vi letar efter!
 



  





**Om oss** 




 Sedan 2018 har Trelson hjälpt skolor runt om i världen att låsa ner och kontrollera elevers datorer under prov och lektioner. Vår nedlåsning hindrar eleverna från att bli distraherade och tar bort möjligheten att fuska på prov. Med andra ord gör vi det möjligt för lärare att på ett säkert sätt bedöma sina elevers kunskaper.
 



  





 Vi är ett team på cirka 10 personer, vilket innebär att varje enskild person som arbetar med Trelson har stor betydelse för verksamheten.
 



  





**Rollen** 




 Du kommer att arbeta direkt med vår CTO, som bidrar till kodbasen varje dag, och tillsammans kommer ni att utgöra vårt tekniska team. Du kommer inte bara att bygga funktioner, du kommer att äga delar av plattformen och vara ansvarig för kvalitet, prestanda och riktning över tid.
 



  





 Våra säljare och kundansvariga är våra närmaste partners när det gäller produktutveckling, tillsammans med våra faktiska kunder och slutanvändare. Ett nära samarbete med dem är en stor del av hur vi bestämmer vad vi ska bygga härnäst.
 



  





 Eftersom vi är ett litet team är rollens bred. Du kanske bygger en ny funktion, förbättrar något befintligt, undersöker ett produktionsproblem med support, fixar en bugg som du själv har upptäckt eller omprövar ett arbetsflöde. Vi förväntar oss att du är lika nyfiken och bekväm oavsett vad du sitter med.
 



  





**Det här kommer du göra** 



* Bygga och underhålla Trelsons plattform över hela stacken, med fokus på produktionshastighet, kvalitet och säkerhet
* Äga delar av applikationen, inklusive prestanda och arkitektur
* Skapa funktioner som integreras med Google Workspace och Microsoft 365
* Hjälpa supporten att undersöka och lösa tekniska problem som de inte kan hantera på egen hand
* Bidra till tekniska beslut och arkitektur tillsammans med CTO
* Upprätthålla kodkvalitet genom granskning och kontinuerlig förbättring
* Ta egna idéer från koncept till produktion
* Använda relevanta AI-verktyg som en naturlig del av ditt arbetsflöde



  





**Vem vi söker** 




 Först och främst: du måste vara vass. Vi letar inte efter någon som klarar sig, vi letar efter någon som sticker ut. Någon som tänker hårdare, gräver djupare och håller sig till en standard som de flesta människor inte är motiverade nog att hålla sig till.
 



 Du är förmodligen utbildad mjukvaruutvecklare med ca 2-5 års yrkeserfarenhet. Men det som betyder mer än ditt CV är hur du tänker och hur du ser på ditt arbete.
 



  





 Du:
 


* Tar ditt jobb på allvar
* Vill äga saker, inte bara bidra till dem
* Är nyfiken till din natur och vill förstå varför, inte bara hur
* Upptäcker problem innan de blir problem och åtgärdar dem
* Är bekväm med att göra det som behövs, oavsett om det är ”ditt” område eller inte
* Behöver inte bli tillsagd att förbättra något, du ser det och du gör något åt det
* Är ärlig när något blivit fel, även när det gäller ditt eget arbete
* Använder AI-verktyg på ett naturligt sätt i ditt dagliga arbete



  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* Utbildad i mjukvaruutveckling, eller har motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* 2-5 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med både frontend och backend
* Erfarenhet av att skriva testad, säker och bra kod
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift



  





**Meriterande** 



* Utbildad i mjukvaruutveckling, eller har motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* 2-5 års erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med både frontend och backend
* Erfarenhet av att skriva testad, säker och bra kod
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift



  





 Bortsett från kvalifikationer är det viktigaste att du passar in i vårt team och våra värderingar, som kommer vara den avgörande faktorn i anställningsprocessen.
 



  





**Vår filosofi** 




 Alla i teamet arbetar efter fyra överenskomna principer. Det är inget vi hänger upp på väggen som prydnad, utan det är enligt dem vi faktiskt arbetar.
 



  




* **Ta initiativ:** 
 Vi väntar inte på instruktion för att förbättra saker. Om du ser något som kan bli bättre tar du själv det första steget.
* **Sträva efter excellens, inte perfektion:** 
 Fokus, ansträngning och professionalism i allt vi gör. Vi tar fullt ansvar för vårt arbete.
* **Skapa förtroende genom handling:** 
 Förtroendet mellan oss i teamet och våra kunder är det viktigaste vi har. Förtroende bygger vi upp genom små saker: att göra vad vi lovat, att vara ärliga när saker går fel, att kommunicera.
* **Säkerheten först:** 
 Vår produkt hanterar miljontals prov varje år. Att sätta säkerheten först är vårt ansvar.



  





**Det här erbjuder vi** 



* En roll med ägarskap och verklig påverkan
* En tekniskt komplex produkt som dagligen används av elever och lärare över hela världen, och som ligger i framkant när det gäller vad som är tekniskt möjligt inom classroom management
* Nära samarbete med en hands-on CTO
* 25 semesterdagar
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Flexibel arbetsmiljö med möjlighet att arbeta hemifrån två dagar i veckan



  





**Practical details** 




 Anställning: Heltid, med 6 månaders provanställning
 



 Start: Augusti/September
 



 Plats: Stockholm
 



  





**Hur du ansöker** 




 Ansök via LinkedIn eller skicka ditt CV till hr@trelson.com och ge oss några rader om varför du skulle passa bra för tjänsten och vårt team.
 



  





 Vi går igenom ansökningar och intervjuar löpande, så vänta inte med att ansöka.

title: Backend Developer
description:
With over 40 million visits each month, you’ll be part of Sweden’s most popular property platform – and one of the world’s most admired real estate platforms. With access to vast amounts of data, you’ll have limitless opportunities to explore and create new features that enhance the experience for Sweden’s real estate agents, home buyers, and sellers.
   

  

 You’ll join a collaborative, cross-functional team where your unique perspective is truly valued. As a senior engineer, you’ll lead by example by crafting elegant code while driving architectural evolution, mentoring colleagues, and helping us build a modern, scalable platform.
   

  

**What You’ll Do 💥** 
  

  

 The team's mission is to help our users explore and shape their property journey by giving them personalized, highly relevant and engaging content on the Hemnet platform. Our ambition is to create a unified, intuitive experience that helps users stay oriented, inspired, and supported. In this role, you’ll
   

  

* Design and build resilient solutions using Claude, Node.js, Nest.js, Ruby and GraphQL.
* Play a central role in the collaboration with our CRM and Marketing team to make personalized communication possible, from segmentation and behavioral signals, to delivering timely, meaningful messaging across channels.
* Own the integration with our CRM and marketing platforms, ensuring reliable, scalable, and secure data pipelines.
* Bridge the gap between tech and business by translating technical concepts into clear, actionable ideas for non-technical stakeholders, including marketing and product teams.
* Collaborate with product managers, designers, and fellow engineers both internally and externally with other Hemnet domains.
* Empower others through mentorship, knowledge sharing, and fostering a culture of continuous learning.


  

  

**Who we think you are** 
 🤩
   

  

 We believe you are a collaborative problem-solver who is deeply proficient in Node and backend architecture. You don't just write great code; you thrive on building relationships, translating technical concepts for non-tech peers, and creating smart, sustainable integration solutions together.
   

  

* Extensive experience architecting backend systems and managing third-party tools or CRM integrations.
* Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with a proven track record of collaborating effectively with non-technical teams.
* A deep understanding of Node.js, Nest.js, and service-oriented architecture (familiarity with Ruby is a plus, and no deep frontend UI work is required).
* Adaptability and an eagerness to learn new technologies as our ecosystem and marketing needs evolve.
* A strategic mindset for scaling data systems, managing third-party APIs, and improving the overall developer experience.


  

  

**I am your new manager 👋** 
  

  

 Hi!
   

  

 My name is Staffan, and I’ll be your new manager. I’ve been at Hemnet since 2019 and since last year working as Engineering Manager for a domain called Consumers. Our teams are currently working on many new and important areas for Hemnet – including personalization and smarter search features (including several initiatives utilizing AI to deliver next level user experience).
   

  

 My leadership style is listening, transparent, accessible, and supportive, while also challenging you to take your next step. Hopefully, we’ll learn a lot from each other and have plenty of fun as we break new ground at Hemnet. As a team, we get things done; we know when and where value can be added, and we’re clear on our priorities.
   

  

 Why did I decide to join Hemnet? I was strongly drawn to the culture and atmosphere – a wonderful combination of kindness, inclusiveness, and helpfulness, paired with high ambitions and a strong drive forward. My impression is that the people and the workplace together create the perfect foundation for you to do the best work of your career.
   

  

**A Note on Inclusion 💚** 
  

  

 At Hemnet, we believe that diversity in gender, sexual orientation, ability, neurodiversity, cultural background and life experience makes us stronger. We welcome applicants of all identities and backgrounds.
   

  

 If you meet many but not all of the requirements, we encourage you to apply. We value curiosity, a strong sense of purpose and the motivation to learn and grow, alongside your skills and experiences.
   

  

 Our friendly Hemnet culture fosters a dynamic, playful environment where every voice is valued. Here, you’ll join a welcoming team that encourages you to thrive and grow, working alongside passionate colleagues from around the world.
   

  

**An Office-First Culture 🙏** 
  

  

 We believe in the power of connection and the importance of flexibility. Our central Stockholm office is our hub for collaboration three days a week, with two remote days to support your personal work-life balance. We prioritize a sustainable pace because we know our best work happens when we’re energized and inspired.

title: Full Stack Developer needed!
description:
*Do you want to combine technology, innovation, and real business impact? We are now looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer who wants to build smart digital solutions for production and logistics at a forward-thinking company in the automotive industry, based in Södertälje. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to take ideas from proof of concept to scalable solutions – working closely with both technology and business.* 




  





**About the position** 




 We at Perido are now looking for an experienced engaged and solution-oriented full stack developer to build and deploy applications (as PoC or MVP) that improve production and logistics. The client company is an exciting and forward-thinking company in the automotive industry. The position is based in Södertälje.
 



  





**Your daily tasks** 




 In this role, you will develop full stack software solutions while also acting as a trusted advisor and technical leader. You’ll be part of a team of a very diverse team from developers to data scientists but also project managers and automation engineers and a solution architect.
 



 You will:
 


* Be comfortable moving between system layers, understanding physical hardware interactions as well as backend/frontend development. Curiosity, adaptability, and the willingness to quickly learn and adapt new technologies are essential
* Collaborate closely with IT, Production & Logistics and other stakeholders to understand their needs, identify high-value use cases and translate business needs into IT-solutions
* Design, develop, implement and leverage cloud technologies’ (e.g. Docker, Kubernetes, Load balancing, etc.) where it adds value in digital solutions for production and logistics
* Explore and prototype new technologies, then help industrialize them into scalable and maintainable solutions
* Present, demonstrate, and share your work, helping educate others along the way
* Lead and facilitate workshops, demos, and knowledge-sharing sessions, coaching colleagues and promoting best practices as a technical expert
* Create clear and engaging visualizations, dashboards, and storytelling material to support fact-based decisions
* Showcasing solutions and insights to internal communities, and visitors – internal and external



  





**Your characteristics** 




 We are looking for a curious, collaborative, and solution-oriented person who enjoys working close to real operations and people. You bring a collaborative and unpretentious mindset, and you are comfortable translating business needs into technical solutions together with a wide range of stakeholders. With strong communication skills, you can present and visualize ideas in a clear and engaging way, while also sharing your knowledge and supporting others. You are self-driven, proactive, and motivated to not only develop prototypes but also turn them into robust, scalable solutions that create real value.
 



 Does this sound like an exciting opportunity? We look forward to reading your application!
 



  





**Qualifications:** 



* A Master of Science in Computer Science or similar
* Strong ability to communicate complex concepts to non-technical audiences
* Experience working with business or process owners to design, develop, and implement IT-solutions end-to-end
* A genuine interest in production, logistics, and industrial processes (automotive or similar industry is a plus)
* A proactive mindset and willingness to take ownership and technical leadership when needed
* Ability to balance experimentation with robustness and operational requirements
* Good communication skills in English is required



  





**Preferred skills** 



* Industrial integration technologies, event driven integrations and system integrations (e.g. MQTT)
* Backend: skills in e.g. Python are required but more important is to have the ability to switch between technologies
* Frontend: React, Angular, Vue (or similar)
* SQL and/or NoSQL databases
* Cloud environments (AWS, Azure); cloud technologies (Docker, Kubernetes, managing Linux)
* CI/CD pipelines, Git, and DevOps practices



  





**Meritorious** 



* Experience with MES, IoT platforms, sensor data, or automation systems
* Additional language skills such as Swedish is a plus



**Contract type and hours** 




 Full-time consulting assignment until 2026-12-31. Start 2026-06-01.
 



  





**Let us help you take the next step in your career** 




 Our vision is to ensure that everyone thrives and feels engaged at work. With us, you will find a wide variety of assignments, where you can either be employed directly by a company or work as a consultant through Perido. We are one of Sweden’s largest consulting firms for professionals, which gives you many opportunities. As a consultant, you become an important part of our organization and contribute your expertise within our clients’ organizations. Read more about us at Perido:
 
 https://perido.se/om-oss/
 




 You can find answers to most questions or concerns at
 
 perido.se/vanliga-fragor/
 
 . If you still cannot find what you are looking for, you are welcome to contact us at
 **fraga@perido.se.** 
 Please always include the position reference number
 **35818** 
 in the subject line. Please note that we only accept applications through our website and that we are unable to provide updates on your application status or disclose the client company if it is not stated in the job advertisement.

title: Full-stack Developer
description:
**Introduction**
 We are looking for a Backend-focused Full Stack Developer who enjoys building scalable systems and robust services in modern cloud environments. In this role, you will work primarily with backend development in the .NET and Azure ecosystem, designing and building APIs, services, and cloud-native solutions that power modern web applications and enterprise platforms.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain backend services and APIs using .NET.
* Build scalable, cloud-native applications in Azure.
* Model and implement solutions for complex business domains using modern architectural patterns.
* Design databases, data access layers, and integrations using ORMs and data-driven architectures.
* Develop and maintain microservices and distributed systems.
* Ensure systems are secure, performant, and scalable.
* Work with modern DevOps practices including CI/CD, automated testing, and containerization.
* Collaborate with frontend developers and other stakeholders to deliver reliable end-to-end solutions.


**Qualifications**
**You have previous and solid experience with:**
**Backend Development**
* Strong experience in C# and .NET for building backend services and APIs
* Designing and developing RESTful APIs using ASP.NET / ASP.NET Core
* Experience working with service-oriented or microservice-based architectures


**Cloud & Infrastructure**
* Building and deploying applications in cloud environments such as Azure, AWS, or GCP
* Experience with cloud-native services, scalable architectures, and distributed systems


**Data & Persistence**
* Working with relational databases such as SQL Server or Azure SQL
* Experience with ORMs such as Entity Framework
* Understanding of database design, performance, and data access patterns


**DevOps & Tooling**
* Version control using Git
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines and development workflows (Azure DevOps or similar)


**Frontend (supporting Experience)**
* Working knowledge of JavaScript or TypeScript
* Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as Angular, React, or Vue
* Basic understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design


**Characteristics That Can Spell Success For This Role Are**
* Curious and eager to continuously learn new technologies and approaches.
* Collaborative team player who enjoys sharing knowledge and working closely with others.
* Takes ownership and drives work from idea to implementation.
* Solution-oriented with the ability to break down complex problems into practical solutions.
* Communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English, both spoken and written, to effectively communicate with customers and stakeholders.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Software Engineer – C# / .NET** 




 📍
 **Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid – 2–3 days onsite)
 



 💰
 **Salary:** 
 55,000 – 65,000 SEK/month
 



 🕒
 **Type:** 
 Full-time
 



  





 My client is one of the leading travel and hospitality technology businesses in Northern Europe, building software platforms used by hotels, resorts, attractions, transport providers, and experience operators across the continent. Their products help power bookings, ticketing, e-commerce, integrations, and digital guest experiences at scale.
 



  





 They’re looking for a
 **C# /.NET Engineer** 
 to join their Stockholm-based engineering team, helping build and evolve business-critical backend systems and integrations used across a large-scale SaaS platform.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing** 



* Design, build, and maintain backend services using
 **C# / .NET**
* Develop scalable APIs and integrations across platform services
* Work on modern cloud-based systems and distributed architectures
* Collaborate with product and engineering teams on new feature development
* Improve system reliability, performance, and maintainability
* Contribute to architecture discussions and technical decision-making
* Support CI/CD pipelines, deployments, and engineering best practices
* Participate in code reviews and knowledge sharing across the team



  





**What They’re Looking For** 



* Strong commercial experience with
 **C# /.NET** 
 development
* Experience building APIs, backend services, and scalable applications
* Comfortable working with SQL databases and distributed systems
* Experience with cloud environments and modern development practices
* Strong problem-solving and communication skills
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work across teams



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience within SaaS or product-led businesses
* Exposure to integrations, payments, booking, or e-commerce platforms
* Experience working in agile product environments



  





**Why Join?** 



* Modern product engineering environment with strong technical ownership
* Hybrid working model in Stockholm
* Collaborative and international engineering culture
* Opportunity to work on large-scale SaaS products used across Europe
* Strong long-term growth and investment in technology

title: Fullstack Engineer - Generative UI Platform
description:
UI Studio is Spotify’s internal generative UI prototyping platform that enables teams to spin up fully functioning replicas of Spotify surfaces — complete with playable music — to explore and pitch new product ideas. What started as a small internal project has evolved into a widely adopted platform, and we’re now expanding it into a full generative UI system where teams can prompt for the interfaces they need.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Fullstack Engineer who is strong across backend systems and confident building high-quality frontend experiences — to help scale the platform’s technical foundations and AI-native capabilities. You’ll play a meaningful role in shaping architecture, evolving core systems, and delivering reliable, developer-facing platform functionality used across Spotify.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Design and deliver fullstack features that power UI Studio’s generative platform capabilities
* Architect and implement scalable services and user-facing workflows using TypeScript across frontend and backend (Node.js)
* Integrate LLM-powered coding agents into product workflows, including tool use, planning loops, evaluation loops, and multi-step orchestration
* Contribute to search and retrieval infrastructure, including vector-based search systems, indexing strategies, and relevance optimization
* Design, ship, and operate distributed systems deployed via containerized infrastructure such as Docker and Kubernetes
* Take end-to-end ownership of well-scoped systems and features, from technical design and implementation through deployment, monitoring, and operational support
* Improve internal APIs, platform primitives, and developer tooling to create intuitive and scalable platform experiences
* Uphold strong engineering standards through automated testing, observability, documentation, and continuous delivery practices


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have professional experience building production systems with TypeScript and Node.js, and you’re comfortable contributing across the full stack
* You have hands-on experience building or meaningfully integrating LLM-powered coding agents, including tool integrations and multi-step workflows
* You understand search and retrieval design patterns, such as vector search systems, Elasticsearch, and indexing strategies
* You have a passion for (and preferably experience working with) Design Systems
* You have experience designing and operating distributed systems and deploying services using containerized tooling such as Docker and Kubernetes
* You demonstrate strong software engineering fundamentals and can independently ship well-scoped features end-to-end
* You think in systems — considering reliability, scalability, observability, and maintainability in your designs
* You communicate clearly in writing and produce structured, actionable technical documentation
* You care about developer experience and have experience building tools or platforms used by other engineers


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Software Engineers
description:
*MSAB is a global leader in digital forensic technology for mobile device examination and analysis. The MSAB vision is to empower every investigation with digital forensic solutions – for a safer world. A core value is to run an ethics-driven company with innovation and results. The sole focus of MSAB is on delivering high quality digital forensic solutions to collect, review, analyze and manage data. MSAB is a trusted partner to Law Enforcement, Defence Forces, Government Agencies and Forensic Laboratories in democratic countries throughout the world enabling them to investigate crime, gather intelligence, investigate fraud and fight corruption.* 




  





 To our new Stockholm office we’re looking for two engineers to join our Unicore team. You enjoy building systems that are not only functional, but also efficient, scalable, and thoughtfully designed. This is a chance to work with technology with a purpose – to create a safer world.
 



  





**The job** 




 At MSAB, the Unicore team is responsible for the core of our digital forensics platform, including UNIFY and the XRY file format (Core API). We’re now working on the next generation of UNIFY, and this is an opportunity to help shape it from the inside.
 



  





 In this role, you will work with core system development where performance and reliability are critical. You’ll be dealing with distributed systems and data-intensive workloads, contributing to architectural decisions with long-term impact, and exploring how to best leverage hardware such as CPU and GPU.
 



  





 Our current tech stack includes C99, C++20, and C# (.NET 8/10), along with gRPC, SQLite and PostgreSQL, running across both Windows and Linux environments.
 



  





**Who You Are** 




 We believe you will thrive in this environment if you have a genuine interest in programming and problem-solving, and if you care about performance, clean design, and user experience. You likely enjoy systems engineering, think in terms of trade-offs, and prefer solving meaningful problems over fitting into rigid roles. An appreciation for simplicity and keeping dependencies lean will serve you well.
 



  





**Your Experience** 




 You will benefit from your experience with DevOps and CI/CD practices, containerization with Docker, or cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure which is considered a plus.
 



 You will be part of a focused team working close to the core of the product, where your decisions matter and your code has real impact.
 



  





 Interested, or know someone who might be? Reach out or apply — we’d love to connect.
 



  





 There is much more to talk about, like values, our growth plans, technology choices etc., but we save that for the interview.
 



  





 Welcome to apply now!
 



  





 For more information about MSAB, please visit: http://www.msab.com
 



  





**What we can offer** 




 Create a safer world with us!
 



 As one of the world’s leading digital forensics companies, MSAB leads the way in pioneering advancements that contribute to making our world safer.
 



 Your work at MSAB will bridge the gap between technology and justice. You will be inspired to go beyond your comfort zone, and you will deal with challenging and meaningful projects. When you join us, you become part of a global team that aspires to create a safer digital future, one breakthrough at a time.
 



 We can offer you an exciting work environment, where we value being innovative, acting ethically and delivering results in everything we do while our customers' needs are at the center. We are proud to be a fast-growing international company with more than 20+ nationalities and we work with things that really make a difference.
 



 Every day at MSAB is an opportunity to redefine the future of digital forensics.
 



 Are you up for the challenge?
 



 Department Development Role C++ Developer Locations Stockholm, Sweden Remote status Hybrid

title: Fullstack-developer (front-end focus)
description:
TBox builds a platform for industrial and geopolitical intelligence. We help Swedish industrial companies understand risks, dependencies and opportunities in a complex world, combining geopolitical expertise with data analytics, AI and product development.
 



  





 In practice, that means collecting, structuring and analysing complex information from a wide range of sources. We're a small cross functional team in Stockholm with analysts and engineers, which means short distance from idea to impact and plenty of room to shape both the technology and the product.
 



  





 We're now looking for a Fullstack-developer to join us as development ramps up.
 



  





**About the role** 




 You'll be working closely with engineers and analysts and build both internal tools that support our analysts in their daily work, and a client-facing app where insights reach our customers.
 



 Even though this role is frontend-focused, you'll need to be comfortable digging into the backend, writing Python, working with APIs and querying databases.
 



  





**What you'll do** 



* Build and iterate on internal tools supporting our analysts
* Develop our client app and building out features from scratch
* Collaborate closely with analysts and other developers to understand needs and translate them into solutions



  





**What you bring** 




 We run Vue.js on the frontend, Python on the backend and AWS in the cloud. Beyond the stack, we're looking for someone who thrives when the path isn't fully mapped out, takes initiative and enjoys getting close to the problem, understanding what's actually needed and turning it into value.
 



  





**Must have:** 



* 3+ years of experience as a frontend or fullstack developer
* Strong proficiency in JavaScript and TypeScript, and experience with a modern frontend framework
* Comfortable working across the stack, Python, APIs and databases are part of the day-to-day
* Experience with AWS or similar cloud infrastructure



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Experience with data visualisation and charting libraries
* CSS and an eye for UI
* Docker and CI/CD
* Swedish language skills



  





**What we offer** 



* Frontend ownership in a greenfield phase, you'll help define how we build, not just execute on what's already decided
* The stability of a well-backed company with the energy of a startup
* A collaborative, open culture where curiosity and initiative are valued
* Office on Blasieholmen in Stockholm, office first with one day working from home per week



  





*EU citizenship required. A background check is part of the recruitment process.*

title: Staff Engineer - Mobile
description:
Flightradar24 is one of the most successful growth-stage tech companies in Stockholm. Each day, more than 5 million aviation enthusiasts visit Flightradar24 (app/website), and our Commercial services team has many of the biggest names in aviation on its customer list.
 



  





**About the role** 




 We’re looking for a seasoned
 **Staff Mobile Engineer / Tech Lead** 
 to take ownership of our mobile technical direction across both iOS and Android.
 



  





 In this role, you will act as the technical anchor for our mobile teams, driving architecture decisions, shaping our long-term strategy, and mentoring a team of 10 engineers. While your core expertise is within iOS, you bring a cross-platform mindset and are comfortable bridging the gap between iOS and Android to ensure consistency, scalability, and excellence across both platforms.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 




 In this role, you will take end-to-end ownership of our mobile technical direction, shaping how we build, scale, and evolve our apps across both iOS and Android. You’ll operate at the intersection of hands-on engineering, architecture, and leadership – setting the standards for how a high-performing mobile team works.
 



  





 You will play a key role in modernizing our mobile platforms, driving architectural decisions, and ensuring a consistent and scalable approach across both ecosystems. At the same time, you’ll collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to deliver seamless user experiences to millions of users worldwide.
 



  





**Your responsibilities include:** 



* Owning the mobile technical roadmap, including architecture, engineering standards, and long-term scalability across iOS and Android
* Leading the evolution of our iOS platform while driving cross-platform alignment in architecture, patterns, and best practices
* Modernizing and refactoring our codebase into a modular, testable setup, while improving CI/CD, build performance, and release workflows
* Collaborating closely with engineering, product, design, and QA to deliver high-quality user experiences at a global scale
* Mentoring and guiding engineers, fostering a culture of technical excellence, ownership, and continuous improvement



  





**Current tech stack** 



* iOS: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, async/await
* Android: Kotlin, Jetpack Compose
* Architecture: MVVM, Clean Architecture, modularization
* CI/CD: Fastlane, Xcode Cloud, GitLab



  





**About you** 




 You are a senior mobile engineer with a strong foundation in iOS development and a genuine interest in building scalable, high-quality mobile products. To succeed in this role, you have experience mentoring engineers and ideally have previous experience working in a Tech Lead or similar leadership role.
 



  





 You have experience working with complex systems and understand what it takes to modernize and evolve a mobile codebase over time. While iOS is your core strength, you are confident navigating cross-platform environments and contributing to alignment across iOS and Android teams.
 



  





 You care deeply about code quality, testing, and developer experience, and you take pride in building maintainable, well-structured solutions and great end-user experience. At the same time, you are a collaborative and communicative team player who enjoys mentoring others and creating alignment across teams.
 



  





**We believe you bring:** 



* Deep expertise in iOS development, including Swift, UIKit, SwiftUI, and modern concurrency
* Experience contributing to or leading architectural decisions in large-scale mobile applications
* A solid understanding of cross-platform development, with the ability to collaborate with and guide Android teams
* Strong knowledge of software design principles, testing practices, and CI/CD workflows
* A proactive mindset, with a drive to improve performance, reliability, and ways of working



  





**We see it as a bonus if you have…** 



* Experience working with real-time data or high-frequency data rendering
* Knowledge of map and geospatial technologies (e.g. MapKit, Google Maps SDK)
* Experience optimizing performance for large datasets and animations on mobile
* Familiarity with background processes, location services, and push notification systems
* An interest in aviation, flight tracking, or real-time data products



  





**More about Flightradar24** 




 Flightradar24 is a leading flight tracking and aviation data provider powered by the world’s largest ADS-B network. It serves millions of users via its consumer platform and provides aviation insights to airlines, airports, and other industry stakeholders.
 



  





 The platform is powered by 50,000+ receivers streaming real-time aircraft data, processing billions of data points monthly and maintaining multi-terabyte historical datasets trusted even by government agencies for accident investigations.
 



  





**Benefits of working at Flightradar24 include:** 



* Opportunity to impact a service with millions of end users from all around the world
* Contribute to the value that Flightradar24 creates both for B2C and B2B but also for humanity
* Modern office in the heart of beautiful downtown Stockholm, Sweden
* Being part of a diverse team
* Flexible and social work environment with free beverages, fruit, and snacks



  





*The position requires that you be able to work in Stockholm, Sweden.*

title: Software Engineer within eHealth
description:
*Cambio is one of the Nordics' leading suppliers in e-health with a comprehensive offering for the entire health and care chain. Our e-health solutions supports health care professionals in their daily work and offer patients safer and more easily accessible care. We are proud to be an important part of Swedish healthcare. We are growing continuously and now have about 1000 employees in several countries.*
**The position**
 Do you want to fundamentally change how open platforms of the future will play a role in healthcare and welfare improvement? Do you want to work with complex information systems designed for innovation, interoperability and with requirements to scale? Do you want to work with products on an international market?
   

  

 If so, then we have got a fantastic opportunity for you to become a member of our Cambio Platform team. Our vision is to create a new open platform as a foundation for a future eHealth ecosystem. A fundamental part of an ecosystem that is driven by the value of information and the enabling of innovation for Cambio, other vendors as well as the business themselves to deliver value to everyone from clinicians to citizens. A key part of this platform is the OpenEHR Clinical Data Repository (CDR), which provides a standards-based foundation for managing, sharing, and evolving clinical data across products, services, and ecosystems.
   

  

 We are now looking for a senior software engineer to be part of our team, where you will play a key role in shaping how we deliver reliable, scalable, and efficient solutions across the company — with a strong focus on building and evolving our OpenEHR-based Clinical Data Repository (CDR) as a core component of the Cambio Platform.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop, test, and evolve backend services for the Cambio CDR product
* Design and operate services in containerized environments
* Participate in code reviews, design discussions, and provide technical expertise to the team
* Build and improve CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and improve services in production
* Collaborate on architecture, reliability, and security decisions


**We Offer**
* Join a passionate group of experts working with modern technologies and industry best practices, where collaboration leads to real impact
* A dynamic environment full of new challenges and a broad technology stack to keep your skills sharp and your work exciting
* Technical freedom to influence the tools and technologies you work with, empowering you to craft the best solutions


**About You**
 We believe that you are passionate about solving technical challenges and have effective communication skills when cooperating cross teams. You thrive in a changing environment and independently drive your own and your team's work forward.
   

  

 At Cambio, we value initiative and personal growth. Our culture is built on Trust, Care, and Together—values we believe are important to both our work and our people. It’s important to us that you recognize and identify with these values.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Strong experience from Java or Kotlin programming languages
* Strong understanding of service-oriented architectures and microservices
* Comfortable using modern AI tools as a natural part of your development workflow.
* Understanding of cyber security and secure software development principles such as token-based authentication, identity federation, and Zero Trust architectures.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English


**It's a bonus if you have**
* Experience working with OpenEHR, clinical information models, or healthcare interoperability standards
* Experience from building and setting up test automation
* Experience working according to DevOps/DevSecOps principles


**\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_**
**Place of employment** 
 : Stockholm or Linköping
   

  

**Scope** 
 : Full-time, hybrid work model (three days per week in-office)
   

  

**Form of employment:** 
 Permanent employment, 6 months trial period
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 The role involves access to sensitive information, therefore a background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
   

  

 We review applications and conduct interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply as soon as possible via the link.
   

  

**We look forward to receiving your application!**
**CAMBIO- FOR A HEALTHIER TOMORROW**
 Welcome to a company where healthcare is improved every day. Here you will work with leading technology in a collaborative, trusting and empowering environment where your contribution will be appreciated and celebrated. In our caring culture you will have the opportunity to pursue different paths of professional growth. Seize the opportunity to do the most important work of your life
 **.** 
 Read more about us
 **here!**
**A healthier tomorrow also means taking care of those who make it possible -** 
 explore our employee benefits
   

  

 Learn more about our recruitment process here
   

  

 Are you interested in Cambio but you don’t feel that this position is the perfect match? Check out our other open positions at our career site.
   

  

 Cambio Healthcare Systems is Sweden’s leading suppliers of healthcare information systems and a growing player in the European market with just over 100,000 users across general and university hospitals, specialist units and outpatient units. Through the use of our integrated solutions, our customers provide services to 4 million patients.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description:
Zymego is a fast-growing healthtech company that solves a fundamental global problem of empty appointments in healthcare due to late cancellations. Zymego helps healthcare providers in Sweden and the UK fill empty appointments, completely automated. This shortens care queues and healthcare staff can spend less time on administration and more time providing care. Together, Zymego's customers have shortened waiting times in Sweden by 2,500 years.
   

  

 We are currently expanding in Sweden and the UK and are now looking for a Senior Full-Stack Engineer who wants to help shape the future of digital healthcare.
   

  

**Why this role stands out**
 At Zymego, engineers are trusted with real ownership and real impact.
   

  

 You’ll work across the full product stack — from PostgreSQL schema design and backend APIs to React-based user experiences used daily by clinics and healthcare staff.
   

  

 This is a hands-on role with real ownership. You won´t just implement features; you´ll help shape how the platform evolves technically and operationally as the company grows.
   

  

**You will:**
* Design and optimise core systems using PostgreSQL, backend APIs (TypeScript), and React
* Solve complex, high-impact problems related to scheduling, operational efficiency, and healthcare workflows
* Own end-to-end feature development: From PostgreSQL schema design to React-based UI implementation, from specifications to maintenance in production
* Influence technical decisions, infrastructure, and product direction in a scaling startup


**How We Work**
 We care deeply about strong engineering fundamentals.
   

  

**Backend** 
 : Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL
   

  

**Frontend** 
 : React, tRPC, GraphQL
   

  

**Infrastructure** 
 : multi-cloud, Infrastructure as Code with Pulumi, Grafana
   

  

**We move quickly, but we care about doing things properly, that mean** 
 s:
   

  

* Automated testing is non-negotiable (unit, integration, e2e, CI/CD pipelines)
* We prioritise scalability and maintainability through simplicity (no over-engineering)
* Engineers are encouraged to challenge ideas, improve systems, and take initiative


**Who You Are**
 You´ve probably worked in startups before and know how to balance speed with long-term thinking.
   

  

 You enjoy ownership, solving difficult problems, and building products where engineering decisions actually matter.
   

  

**You likely have:**
* Senior Full-Stack Expertise: 5+ years with Node.js/TypeScript, PostgreSQL and React
* Startup Proven: Successfully shipped and iterated on products in fast-paced environments
* Quality Advocate: Experience writing comprehensive tests and collaborating with QA processes
* AI: Experience building AI agents


**Bonus if you also have experience with:**
* Familiarity with QA frameworks or test automation
* Background in regulated industries (healthcare, health-tech, fintech)
* DevOps


****Why Zymego****
 This is a small, ambitious team solving real problems in healthcare with modern technology.
   

  

 You´ll work closely with the management team and teammates from multiple countries and backgrounds, in a culture that values curiosity, ownership, and low ego collaboration.
   

  

 We also run monthly innovation days where the team experiments with new techniques, ideas, and tools outside the normal roadmap. You will have great opportunities to influence, contribute with your own initiatives, and develop in line with the company´s ongoing journey.
   

  

**We offer:**
* Competitive salary (including stock options)
* 30 days of vacation
* Occupational pension
* Private healthcare coverage and health benefit
* Office in Stockholm with the possibility of hybrid work


**Application**
 If you’re looking for a place where you can build meaningful products, grow quickly, and work with ambitious people solving real problems — we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

 We work with ongoing selection, so please submit your application as soon as possible.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please contact Pernilla Rydell at pernilla.rydell@zymego.com.

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is redefining how legal work gets done. Not built for lawyers, built with them. We work alongside the world’s best legal teams, who expect excellence, precision, and speed, and we hold ourselves to the same bar.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace lets legal professionals move faster, think more clearly, and operate with sharper precision. By analysing thousands of documents in minutes and powering end-to-end workflows, we cut through complexity, teams can focus on what matters: judgment, strategy, and outcomes.
   

  

 1,000+ customers across 50+ countries trust us, including Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Linklaters, White & Case, Dentons, and Barclays. We’ve scaled to
 **$100M+ in ARR** 
 , with teams across Europe, North America and APAC, and continue to expand through acquisitions including Qura, Walter AI and Graceview.
   

  

 We partner with world-class performers: including Aaron Judge and the New York Yankees, Ludvig Åberg (and his caddie), and campaigns featuring Jude Law.
   

  

 Joining Legora means three things.
   

  

* We lean in: ownership over titles, outcomes over intentions.
* We fight for excellence: high standards, direct, ego-free feedback.
* We grow together: as a team and with our customers.


 Mission before ego. Everyone contributes. No one coasts.
   

  

 If you’re driven by impact, pace, and raising the bar. This is the place.
   

  

**The role**
 As a
 **Platform Engineer** 
 at Legora, you’ll join an enabling team focused on making life easier for developers. Your mission: improve reliability, boost performance, and build a rock-solid platform that scales with the company. You'll work hands-on across infrastructure and backend systems, helping teams ship faster, safer, and smarter.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build the core infrastructure and reliability abstractions that all our engineering teams use
* Sit with all teams and help them structure their SRE efforts: observability, alerting, fault tolerance and reliability
* Proactively monitor our infrastructure and develop it for hyperscale and reliability
* Contribute to incident response and post-incident learning
* Work with Pulumi on primarily Azure, but also AI deployments on AWS and GCP


**Who You Are**
* You have years of experience as a backend engineer but have solid infrastructure, observability, monitoring know-how
* Experience with Kubernetes
* Experience with Pulumi (preferred) or similar IaC tools like AWS CDK, Terraform
* But most importantly, you are someone who
+ “Gets stuff done” and understands building a $10bn company isn’t always glamorous and takes hard work and long hours
+ Proactively and independently solves the most burning problems
+ Strives in a fast-paced environment where the answers aren’t always clear and processes are few


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Android Developer
description:

* Solid understanding of the full mobile development life cycle.
* Familiarity with modern design patterns and best practices.
* Ability to work in a team-oriented environment.

 09-06-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Full Stack Engineer - Audiobooks
description:
Spotify for Authors (SFA) is the creator platform for the audiobook industry — a web application that gives publishers, authors, and narrators tools to manage their catalog, track performance, and distribute content on Spotify. We're scaling toward 100,000 users across a React/TypeScript frontend, Java backend services, and data pipelines that feed into Spotify's broader audiobook ecosystem.
   

  

 SFA connects to Spotify's highest-priority bets: expanding audiobook access, building content creation tools, and shaping discovery surfaces. We operate with a "short toes" philosophy — contribution has no borders, quality is shared, and we use modern tools (including AI) to reduce toil and amplify creativity.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Build and evolve features end-to-end across a React/TypeScript frontend and Java backend services that power the SFA platform at scale
* Use AI-assisted development tools as a core part of your workflow for code generation, automated testing, and AI-powered code review
* Deliver testable, maintainable, and high-quality code and take operational responsibility for the components you develop
* Collaborate closely with engineers, product managers, and designers to ship impactful experiences for audiobook creators
* Contribute to technical discussions and participate in RFCs and code reviews
* Share knowledge and promote best practices within your squad


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience building web applications across the stack. TypeScript and Java experience preferred.
* You're motivated to learn, take on new challenges, and T-shape
* You think product-first while building tech solutions
* You're comfortable using AI tools and agents to support your development workflow
* You're comfortable with modern infrastructure practices (CI/CD, containers, cloud platforms) and care about observability
* You communicate clearly and collaborate well in a distributed team
* You're pragmatic and motivated by solving real problems for creators


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in Stockholm or London
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.
