* A fantastic office in a prime Stockholm location with great spaces and views
* An independent role with the opportunity to make a real impact
* Great opportunities for professional development
* Health - 5 000 kr health care allowance
* Conference abroad every other year
* Breakfast and fruits every day, as well as "holy fika” each Friday
* Regular after work and celebrated successes at the office


**Apply today and be a part of Northmill!**
 Northmill Bank is a tech company with a banking license aiming to improve financial life, offer merchants smart solutions and erase the borders between in-store and online.
   

  

 Northmill creates a more personal and relevant experience for people and companies, helping more than 2,500 merchants and 250,000 end users.
   

  

**Trustpilot** 
 4.5 of 5
   

  

**Cloud** 
 100 %
   

  

**End users** 
 250 000

title: Media Optimization Specialist
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO**
  

 As our next Media Optimization Specialist, you’ll be responsible for driving the performance and efficiency of our paid media investments globally across digital channels full funnel. You will analyse campaign performance, identify optimization levers, and work closely with analytics, markets, and agencies to continuously improve results and maximise business impact. We’re building a dedicated team of Media Optimization Specialist and are now looking for four people to join us in Stockholm.
   

  





 In this role, you’ll:
   

  




* Lead paid media performance optimization globally across digital channels full funnel, with a strong focus on efficiency, effectiveness, and ROI
* Identify and apply media performance drivers and optimization levers based on data and insights
* Work closely with Measurement & Analytics, Controlling, and Sales Market Paid Media Leads to align optimization priorities with business goals
* Apply and support standardized ways of working for media optimization across markets and agencies
* Collaborate with agency and market teams to steer optimization actions, such as budget allocation, bid strategies, and audience performance
* Monitor media performance and optimization outcomes, identifying trends, risks, and improvement areas
* Share and present insights and optimization recommendations with relevant stakeholders to support continuous improvement



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH**
  

 You’ll collaborate closely with:
   

  




* Sales Market Paid Media Leads
* Measurement & Analytics and Controlling teams
* Media agencies and market stakeholders



 Together, you’ll ensure paid media investments are optimised consistently and effectively across markets, driving both short‑ and long‑term performance.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE**
  

*We are looking for people with…*



* A Bachelor’s degree in Business, Marketing, Economics, or a related field
* 5–7 years of experience in paid media optimization, performance marketing, or digital media roles
* Strong understanding of paid digital media performance drivers and optimization levers
* Proven ability to analyse data and translate performance insights into clear optimization actions using different measurement methods such as regression-based attribution and in-platform data.
* Experience working closely with agencies and market teams in complex, multi‑market setups
* Strong understanding of full funnel marketing digital media ecosystem



*And people who are…*



* Analytical and structured, with a strong focus on results and continuous improvement
* Confident communicators, with the ability to influence and collaborate across teams
* Comfortable balancing strategic thinking with hands‑on problem solving
* Clear and effective in written and verbal English communication



**WHO WE ARE**
  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we use our power, scale, and knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**
  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits and extensive development opportunities across the globe. You’ll work in a collaborative, insight‑driven environment where innovation, learning, and performance go hand in hand.
   

  




* 25% Staff discount on all our H&M Group brands, both in stores and online (H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories and ARKET).



**JOIN US**
  

 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things — our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.
   

  





*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you not to attach a cover letter in your application.*

title: Spontanansökan
description:
**Spontanansökan var med och forma Sveriges säkraste IT-miljöer!**
 Hittar du ingen ledig tjänst som matchar just dig?
   

  

 Skicka in en spontanansökan till oss. Vi letar alltid efter fler passionerade talanger som delar vår vision: att skapa ett IT-tryggare Sverige. Vi sparar din ansökan för framtida behov och kontaktar dig när en matchande möjlighet dyker upp.
   

  

**Vill du bli en del av något större?**
 På IT-Total välkomnar vi dig som brinner för att ligga i framkant när det gäller säker IT-infrastruktur, molntjänster, datacenter, NOC/SOC, automation, virtualisering, nätverk och säkerhet.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar du tillsammans med några av branschens främsta experter i en inspirerande miljö där spetskompetens, säkerhet och nytänkande står i fokus.
   

  

 Vi vill vara platsen där du växer – där du kan utvecklas inom just de områden du brinner för. Tillsammans skapar vi en arbetsmiljö där vi delar kunskap, utmanar varandra och alltid strävar efter att hitta de bästa, mest kreativa lösningarna åt våra kunder.
   

  

 Vi värdesätter dig som:
   

  

* Brinner för IT, säkerhet och teknik
* Är glad, utåtriktad och tycker om att bygga relationer
* Vill lära dig nya färdigheter och driva IT-Total framåt
* Tänker nytt, hittar kreativa lösningar och älskar komplexa problem
* Har en bred grund inom IT-infrastruktur, säkerhet, moln eller nätverk
* Vi har krav på att du behärskar svenska obehindrat, både i tal och skrift.


**Varför kommer du att trivas på IT-Total?**
 IT-Total föddes ur idén att vara det bästa företaget för medarbetare inom sin bransch, därför välkomnar vi dig till en arbetsplats som ger dig glädje, stimulans och möjlighet att växa inom det område du brinner för. Vi är en innovativ arbetsgivare som satsar på din framtid och jobbar i teknikens framkant med ett högt säkerhetstänk. Med säkerhetsprövade medarbetare och säkerhetsklassade lokaler- och datahallar garanterar vi trygghet och integritet för våra kunder.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder:**
 🥪 En himmelsk fredagsfrukost med kollegorna
   

  

 🌍 Hybrid arbetsplats
   

  

 💑 Roligt på jobbet - allt från träning till resor och spelkvällar
   

  

 🍏 Ett välfyllt lager av frukt, nötter, gudomligt kaffe från en Kunglig Hovleverantör om så önskas.
   

  

 🍰 Fredagsfika tillsammans
   

  

 🏡 Ett stenkast till både shopping på Mall of Scandinavia och natursköna Brunnsviken som är perfekt för löpning och lunchpromenader
   

  

 ✔ Goda och trygga anställningsvillkor.
   

  

 🙌 Frihet att styra din egen utveckling och ditt eget arbete, vi tror på "Work life balance"
   

  

 👩🏽‍🤝‍🧑🏼 Kollegor i världsklass som bryr sig 💛
   

  

 🚗 Goda parkeringsmöjligheter
   

  

 🏌️‍♂️ Generöst friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

**Vad händer när du ansökt?**
 Vi sparar din ansökan och återkopplar när en tjänst som matchar din profil öppnas.
   

  

**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan.**
**Har du några frågor gällande tjänsten?**
 Tveka då inte att höra av dig till ansvarig rekryterare:
   

  

 Kajsa Jordansson, Talent Acquisition Manager, IT-Total
   

  

 Mail: kajsa.jordansson@it-total.se
   

  

 Tel: 070 -729 19 82

title: Supervisor
description:
**Job Description**
 Core Responsibilities
   

  

  

  
* Assists the ASM and SM in maintaining holiday, attendance, and team scheduling
* Effectively supervise Sales Associates during the shift, dealing with potential issues appropriately and in line with LEGO policies and procedures, with the ASM and SM's support
* Complete orders for store and office supplies in line with guidelines and operating budgets
* Ensures money handling procedures are followed by all Sales Associates
* Ensures a well-organized stockroom is maintained at all times and that all available products are merchandised on the shop floor and loss prevention targets are achieved
* Assists the ASM and SM in achieving a high standard of merchandise presentation following store guidelines


 Applications are reviewed on an ongoing basis. However, please note we do amend or withdraw our jobs and reserve the right to do so at any time, including prior to any advertised closing date. So, if you're interested in this role we encourage you to apply as soon as possible.
   

  

**What’s in it for you?**
 Here is what you can expect
   

  

**Family Care Leave** 
 - We offer enhanced paid leave options for those important times.
   

  

**Insurances** 
 – All colleagues are covered by our life and disability insurance which provides protection and peace of mind.
   

  

**Wellbeing** 
 - We want our people to feel well and thrive. We offer resources and benefits to nurture physical and mental wellbeing along with opportunities to build community and inspire creativity.
   

  

**Colleague Discount** 
 – We know you'll love to build, so from day 1 you will qualify for our generous colleague discount.
   

  

**Bonus** 
 - We do our best work to succeed together. When goals are reached and if eligible, you'll be rewarded through our bonus scheme.
   

  

**Workplace** 
 - When you join the team you'll be assigned a primary workplace location i.e. one of our Offices, stores or factories. Our hybrid work policy means an average of 3 days per week in the office. The hiring team will discuss the policy and role eligibility with you during the recruitment process.
   

  

 Children are our role models. Their curiosity, creativity and imagination inspire everything we do. We strive to create a diverse, dynamic and inclusive culture of play at the LEGO Group, where everyone feels safe, valued and they belong.
   

  

 The LEGO Group is highly committed to equal employment opportunity and equal pay and seeks to encourage applicants from all backgrounds (eg. sex, gender identity or expression, race/ethnicity, national origin, sexual orientation, disability, age and religion) to apply for roles in our team.
   

  

 The LEGO Group is fully committed to Children’s Rights and Child Wellbeing across the globe. Candidates offered positions with high engagement with children are required to take part in Child Safeguarding Background Screening, as a condition of the offer.
   

  

 Thank you for sharing our global commitment to Children’s Rights.
   

  

 Just imagine building your dream career.
   

  

 Then make it real.
   

  

**Join the LEGO® team today.**

title: Risk Data Modeller to Finance, Risk, and Compliance | SEB, Stockholm
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone.
   

  

 Finance, Risk, and Compliance are undergoing a major transformation—driven by business and regulatory changes as well as significant shifts in architectural design. We are therefore looking for a Risk Data Modeller with experience in data modelling to develop an integrated data architecture that meets regulatory requirements and business needs. You will be a vital part of our community driving the Finance, Risk, and Compliance agenda in the bank. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, this opportunity is for you!
   

  

**About the role** 
**:**
 As a Risk Data Modeller in our team, you will take responsibility for the data architecture within the risk area. Your work will involve a high degree of complexity, both from a business and data perspective as well as from a people and process perspective. You’ll work closely with business stakeholders and architects to:
   

  

* Capture and interpret business and regulatory requirements driven by our major initiatives.
* Develop an integrated data architecture for Risk that supports all risk types, ensuring data is consistent, integrated, traceable, and fit for regulatory and business use, while connecting to the domain‑wide data architecture.
* Develop business information and logical data models that align with business needs and integrate with business and application architectures, supporting metadata capture, consistency, lineage, and traceability across the data landscape.
* Support the definition of business terms, and ensure they are correctly represented, consistently used, and traceable across models, data flows, and solutions.
* Ensure compliance with BCBS 239, Basel/CRR, IFRS, and other applicable regulatory requirements, and alignment with the domain architecture.
* Collaborate with stakeholders from the risk organisation, data management professionals, and architects across Finance, Risk, and Compliance.


**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Strong professional background in risk management within a banking or financial services (e.g., credit, market, counterparty, or liquidity risk).
* Competence in developing ontologies, business information models, and logical data models (including normalised and dimensional models), as well as data definitions, data mapping specifications, and data flows.
* Good understanding of data warehouse architectures and methodologies, and familiarity with the Data Mesh framework and data products.
* Knowledge of regulatory and data management requirements in Finance and Risk areas, and how data architecture enables compliance and governance.
* Experience with BCBS 239 (Risk Data Aggregation and Risk Reporting, RDARR) would be an advantage.
* Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills.
* Ability to collaborate effectively with a positive, solution‑oriented mindset.
* Excellent communication and documentation skills to convey complex ideas effectively to both business and IT professionals.
* Fluency in English.


**What we offer:**
* A key role in one of SEB’s most challenging areas
* Innovative working environment with highly motivated colleagues
* Agile and modern ways of working
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week
* Attractive compensation and access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial to our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than June 25th.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer
   

  

**Experience keywords:**
 Risk, Quant, Data Architecture, Data Modelling, Conceptual Modelling, Business Information Modelling, Logical Modelling, Data Warehousing, Data Mesh, Data Product, Ontology, Taxonomy, Agile, SAFe

title: IT-konsult - spontanansökan till Eccera
description:
**Vill du vara med och skapa framtidens IT-lösningar tillsammans med oss på Eccera?** 




  





 Eccera fortsätter att växa och vi söker kontinuerligt efter skickliga konsulter som vill vara en del av vårt team och bidra med expertis, engagemang och modern teknisk kompetens.
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





*Just nu är vi särskilt intresserade av dig som arbetar inom något av följande områden:* 



* **Nätverkstekniker** 
 Erfarenhet av routing, switching, brandväggar, nätverksdesign samt felsökning
* **Systemadministratör** 
 Erfarenhet av drift, underhåll och förvaltning av Windows och/eller Linuxmiljöer
* **Windowstekniker** 
 Fokus på Active Directory, serverdrift, förvaltning, klienthantering, patchning och Microsoft 365
* **Linuxspecialist** 
 Erfarenhet av automation, drift, konfiguration, script, containers samt arbete med säkerhet i fokus
* **IT-supporttekniker** 
 Erfarenhet av IT-support på olika nivåer: 1st, 2nd och 3rd line, samt onsitesupport



  





**Vi söker dig som har:** 



* Relevant utbildning och/eller dokumenterad erfarenhet inom ditt specialistområde
* God teknisk förståelse och förmåga att arbeta strukturerat och lösningsorienterat
* Erfarenhet av arbete i komplexa IT-miljöer, gärna inom större organisationer
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift



  





 Som person är du ansvarstagande, professionell och trivs i en konsultroll där samarbete, kommunikation och kvalitet är centrala delar.
 



  





*Passar inte någon av ovanstående roller in på din spetskompetens?* 




 Utöver ovanstående roller välkomnar vi även spontanansökningar från dig som besitter annan relevant IT-kompetens. Om din profil inte exakt matchar någon av rollerna, men du har erfarenhet och spetskunskap som kan skapa värde i våra kunduppdrag, uppmuntrar vi dig att skicka in din ansökan.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Logistics & Customer Service Coordinator
description:
At BioLamina, our products are helping researchers around the world develop the next generation of cell therapies. Behind every shipment that leaves our facility is a person making sure the right product reaches the right customer at the right time. That person is you.
   

  

 We are looking for a Logistics & Customer Service Coordinator to join our commercial team. This is a central role where you will own the full order flow — from the moment a customer places an order to the moment it is invoiced and delivered.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 As Logistics & Customer Service Coordinator, you will manage and continuously improve our customer service and logistics operations. You will be the primary point of contact for order handling, work closely with our sales team, and ensure that products are shipped and invoiced smoothly and accurately.
   

  

 You will also play an active role in how we develop our processes and tools going forward — including the rollout of our CRM system, HubSpot. You report to the Head of Commercial Strategy & Operations and collaborate cross-functionally with teams across the company.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

* Own the complete order process: receive, handle, and ship orders, and manage invoicing
* Maintain and improve service levels across response times, delivery accuracy, and order quality
* Build and maintain strong day-to-day relationships with customers and suppliers
* Resolve order-related issues and coordinate problem solving across teams
* Monitor inventory and stock levels, flagging potential shortages proactively
* Support Accounting with order follow-up and reconciliation
* Help keep department SOPs and work instructions current and accurate
* Collaborate in the implementation of CRM HubSpot at BioLamina
* Actively contribute to the continuous improvement of customer service processes and tools
* Perform work in compliance with BioLamina’s Quality Management System (QMS)


 What We’re Looking For
   

  

**Required**
* Experience in logistics, warehouse operations, or customer service
* Comfortable working in English — our company language used in daily communication, emails, and documentation
* High school diploma or equivalent — further education is welcome but not required
* Comfortable working with digital tools and systems


**A Plus**
* Experience with order management systems or CRM tools
* Background in a life science, pharma, or quality-regulated environment


 Who You Are
   

  

 You are thorough and methodical by nature — you notice when something doesn’t add up and you follow it through. You have a sharp eye for detail and a strong sense of judgment: you can quickly assess whether something looks right or whether it needs a second look.
   

  

 You pick up new systems and ways of working quickly, and once you understand how something works, you can run with it independently. You are self-driven, well-organized, and take ownership of your responsibilities without needing to be micromanaged.
   

  

 You enjoy being part of a team and communicating clearly across functions — whether it’s a quick update to a colleague or a response to a customer. You stay calm under pressure and find satisfaction in solving practical problems.
   

  

 Why BioLamina?
   

  

 BioLamina is a Swedish biotech company with a clear mission: to enable the cell therapies that will define the next era of medicine. Our products — recombinant laminins used in stem cell culture — are used by researchers worldwide, and we believe they can genuinely change the world.
   

  

 At BioLamina you will work in an international, value-driven environment alongside dedicated and high-performing colleagues. We invest in our people, value diverse perspectives, and are committed to a work environment that is safe, sustainable, and genuinely enjoyable.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.biolamina.com.
   

  

 BioLamina is a biotechnology company with a scientific base and heritage in matrix biology and cell culture research. It supports scientists who have struggled for decades to grow pluripotent stem cells and other primary cells in the lab. By providing tools for efficient and easy cell culture, BioLamina aims to ease the path towards safe and effective cell therapies and make better cell assays and models for increasing accuracy in drug discovery and development. The power of Biolaminin® substrates, developed by BioLamina, has been demonstrated in numerous publications, and they will continue to provide vital support to the stem cell community, from scientific concepts to clinical studies.

title: Creator Marketing Specialist
description:
**About Influeri** 





 Influeri is a fast-moving scale-up transforming creator marketing through automation and AI. We help global brands launch creator campaigns at scale - faster, smarter, and more efficiently than ever. Our technology eliminates the manual work from influencer marketing, making it easy to match, activate, and manage creator campaigns across markets. At the core of Influeri is a growing ecosystem of content creators from all over the world - enabling brands to connect with the right voices, in the right places, at the right time. Now, we’re ready to scale even further.
 




  





**Location:** 

 Sweden
 




**Type:** 

 Full-time
 




**Language:** 

 Swedish + fluent English
 




**Industry:** 

 Creator Marketing / Campaign Operations
 




**Preferred start:** 

 End of June
 




  





**Your Role** 





 You’ll work closely with our campaign management team to coordinate influencer marketing and UGC campaigns - from creator selection and client onboarding to reviewing content and ensuring timely delivery. You’ll also act as a key point of contact for customers and support international campaigns when needed. You’ll be responsible for creating stunning campaigns together with clients, supporting creators in their creative processes, analyzing social media trends, and preparing clear, professional client presentations.
 




  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Support campaign setup, creator support, and coordination
* Create effective and creative influencer marketing and UGC strategies
* Review content and ensure campaign guidelines are followed
* Monitor deadlines, performance, and deliverables
* Act as a point of contact customers and creators
* Analyze social media metrics and campaign performance
* Organize and host client meetings and client pitches
* Upsell existing clients and sell to new clients by pitching new technology, strategic campaign concepts, and scalable creator activation ideas that increase value and drive additional revenue.



  





**You Have** 



* At least 1 year of experience working with influencer marketing and UGC campaigns
* Strong organizational and communication skills
* Native Swedish and fluent English
* Comfortable communicating with both creators and brands
* Confident using social media analytics tools (e.g. Meta Business Suite, TikTok analytics, or similar)
* Experience with presentation tools
* A proactive, detail-oriented, and problem-solving mindset



  





**We Offer** 



* Full-time
* Hybrid remote/office structure
* Hands-on experience with global brands and marketing agencies
* A chance to grow with the most innovative company in the creator marketing space
* Competitive compensation package and growth resources

title: Koordinator
description:
**Vill du arbeta i en verksamhet med ett meningsfullt uppdrag som gör verklig skillnad för människor? Är du en strukturerad person med erfarenhet av administrativt arbete, system och telefonkontakt? Trivs du med noggrant arbete, många kontaktytor och ett stundtals högt tempo? Då kanske det här är rätt tjänst för dig!**




****Om oss****




 Tobiasregistret är det svenska registret för givare av blodstamceller och grundades år 1992. Tobiasregistret matchar svårt sjuka patienter i behov av en blodstamscelltransplantation med lämpliga givare i Sverige eller utomlands. Registret består av frivilliga donatorer, samt den nationella biobanken för navelsträngsblod. Varje år görs flera tusen sökningar efter passande givare i Tobiasregistret. Motsvarande register finns på många andra håll i världen, med vilka vi samarbetar. Sammanlagt är mer än 44 miljoner personer registrerade som potentiella stamcellsdonatorer. Registret utför nationella uppdrag och drivs som ett helägt bolag av Region Stockholm.
   

  





****Om tjänsten****




 Som koordinator kommer du tillsammans med övriga kollegor att handlägga alla förekommande administrativa uppgifter som innefattas i processen hantering av beställningar vid val av donator för transplantationspatienter. Du har kontakt med möjliga unga donatorer samt berörda vård- och blodcentraler i samband med förberedelse inför eventuella donationer. I din roll ligger att noggrant informera donatorer som fått en match om vad detta innebär. 
   

  





 Du dokumenterar arbetet i flera olika IT-system och tillsammans med övriga koordinatorer arbetar du med Tobiasregistrets servicefunktion (telefon, mejl mm). Arbetet som koordinator innebär även att du aktivt deltar i verksamhetens utveckling. Hos oss blir du en del av en härlig grupp koordinatorer som tillsammans arbetar mot gemensamma mål med huvudsyfte att möjliggöra att fler svårt sjuka patienter kan få en passande stamcellsdonator. 
   

  





****Vem är du?****




 För att lyckas i rollen arbetar du strukturerat och noggrant samt har lätt för att kommunicera med olika målgrupper. Du är serviceinriktad, ansvarstagande och trivs med administrativa arbetsuppgifter där kvalitet och noggrannhet är avgörande. Rollen innebär att hantera flera parallella ärenden och processer samtidigt. Därför behöver du vara organiserad, kunna prioritera mellan olika arbetsuppgifter och känna dig bekväm med att arbeta i flera IT-system.
   

  





 Eftersom arbetsplatsen är en mindre verksamhet är god samarbetsförmåga och flexibilitet viktigt. Du trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och tillsammans med kollegor samt bidrar till ett gott arbetsklimat. Vidare trivs du i en miljö där arbetsbelastningen kan variera över tid.
   

  





**För att lyckas i rollen har du:** 



* Gymnasieutbildning eller motsvarande
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av administrativt arbete
* Erfarenhet av arbete med kvalitativa data
* Erfarenhet av servicearbete via telefon och mejl
* God datorvana samt erfarenhet av Microsoft Office och arbete i flera administrativa IT-system
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i både tal och skrift



**Vi ser det som meriterande om du har:** 



* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i offentlig verksamhet
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom register eller donationsverksamhet
* Erfarenhet av CRM-system



 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  





****Vårt erbjudande****




 I rollen som koordinator erbjuds du ett omväxlande och ansvarsfullt arbete i en liten
   

  





 verksamhet med ett viktigt samhällsuppdrag. I din roll kommer du ha nytta av och kunna vidareutveckla din erfarenhet och kunskap om administration, service, koordinering och kommunikation.
   

  





 Vi har kollektivavtal och med det följer kollektivavtalade försäkringar, tjänstepension och möjlighet till löneväxling. För att du ska kunna ta ansvar för din hälsa erbjuder vi friskvårdstimme och friskvårdsbidrag samt subventionerad sjukvård i form av kostnadsfri öppensjukvård. Vi erbjuder flextid i den mån arbetet tillåter och när kunskapsmålen för arbetsuppgifterna är uppfyllda kan även distansarbete förekomma. Här kan du läsa mer om förmånerna i vårt kollektivavtal.
   

  





 Vi befinner oss i centrala Stockholm på Sabbatsbergs sjukhus. Hit tar du dig enkelt med kollektivtrafiken.
   

  





****Ansökan****




 Låter det här som något för dig ser vi gärna att du söker så snart som möjligt. Intervjuer kan komma att ske fortlöpande. För en komplett ansökan bifoga ditt CV och personligt brev. Provtjänstgöring i 6 månader kan komma att tillämpas.
   

  





 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Miranda Drobin, miranda.drobin@regionstockholm.se, 08-123 189 14.
   

  





***Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!***




****Övrigt****




 I vår rekryteringsprocess använder vi oss av Assessios test MAP och Matrigma. MAP är ett
   

  





 personlighetstest och Matrigma är ett icke-verbalt begåvningstest som båda bygger på arbetspsykologisk forskning. Testerna används som ett komplement till dina erfarenheter och kompetenser och syftet är att göra vår urvalsprocess kvalitetssäker och transparent. 
   

  





****Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm****




 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  





 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  





 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  





 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.

title: Enterprise Architect till Axfood IT, Stockholm
description:
Lång beskrivning
   

  

**I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Ada Digital och du ansöker endast via deras hemsida, här: Enterprise Architect till Axfood IT.**
**Notera att ansökningar direkt till Axfood inte kommer att behandlas.**
**Forma teknikriktning nära människorna, processerna och besluten som driver vardagen framåt som Enterprise Architect på Axfood IT**
 Bakom butikshyllan, lagersaldot och varje beslut om sortiment finns ett flöde av data, system och processer som behöver fungera tillsammans. På Axfood IT i Stockholm söker vi nu en Enterprise Architect som vill vara med och utveckla hur just den helheten ska fungera, nu och i morgon.
   

  

 Här arbetar du nära vår verksamhets kärna, inom logistik, varuförsörjning och sortiment, och är med och formar långsiktig teknikriktning och förändring tillsammans med verksamhet, utvecklingsteam och ledning.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Hos oss på Axfood IT tror vi att riktigt bra arkitektur skapas både nära verksamheten och ajour med nutid och framtid, vilket också innebär att idéer snabbare kan omsättas till faktiska förbättringar i vardagen. Hos oss får du (bland annat):
   

  

* Vara med och forma Axfoods applikations- och teknikstrategi
* Arbeta nära kärnprocesser inom retail, logistik och varuförsörjning
* Driva större tekniska förflyttningar och moderniseringar tillsammans med verksamhet och utvecklingsteam
* Bli del av ett team med både en hög teknisk kompetens och en stark samarbetskultur
* En roll med stort mandat, hög grad av självledarskap och ansvar att påverka både riktning och arbetssätt


**Det här gör du hos oss**
 Här behöver du förstå processerna på djupet, kunna skapa förtroende hos hela organisationen och vara drivande och nära de initiativ som driver förändring framåt.
   

  

 Du arbetar inom området vi kallar Varans väg, där Pris och Sortiment, Lager, Logistik och Varuförsörjning möts. Det är processer som påverkar både hela verksamheten och våra kunders vardag, där vi och du under de kommande åren utvecklar våra plattformar, arbetssätt och tekniska förmågor för att skapa smartare och mer effektiva flöden. Ett viktigt fokus framåt är också hur vi vidareutvecklar våra processer med hjälp av data, AI och agentplattformar.
   

  

 Du rör dig mellan flera olika perspektiv och nivåer i organisationen. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Driva och utveckla arkitektur och teknikstrategi inom ditt område (varans väg)
* Arbeta nära processägare, produktägare, IT-ledning, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam
* Säkerställa ett sammanhållet perspektiv över verksamhet, data och teknik
* Driva större förändringsinitiativ och tekniska förflyttningar
* Bidra, när det behövs, i lösningsarkitektur och taktiska initiativ
* Arbeta med governance, prioritering och långsiktig teknisk riktning
* Bidra till utvecklingen av moderna och datadrivna arbetssätt inom verksamheten


**Ditt team och arbetsplats**
 Du tillhör Axfoods enhet för strategi, innovation och arkitektur (SIA), där Enterprise-arkitekter, Säkerhet, Innovation och IT-inköp samlas. Vi arbetar nära både verksamheten och våra operativa IT-kollegor för att skapa långsiktig riktning och stötta våra prioriterade förändringsinitiativ.
   

  

 Vi har under lång tid byggt upp en stark intern utvecklingsförmåga och driver stora delar av utvecklingen själva, vilket gör att vi kan fatta snabba beslut och fortsätta utveckla lösningar som gör verklig skillnad i vardagen. Vår miljö består bland annat av:
   

  

* Moderna SAP-miljöer
* AWS som strategisk plattform för egenutveckling
* SaaS-lösningar och egenutvecklade tjänster
* Moderna integrations- och utvecklingsplattformar


 Vi arbetar enligt en hybrid-policy, med distansarbete när det passar uppgifterna och teamets leveranser, och träffas merparten av veckan på plats på kontoret vid Torsplan.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Vi tror att du är en senior teknisk ledare som känner dig hemma i komplexa miljöer där teknik, verksamhet och förmågor behöver utvecklas tillsammans över tid.
   

  

 Kanske arbetar du idag som Enterprise Architect, domänarkitekt eller senior lösningsarkitekt. Du kan också komma från en konsultroll där du drivit större förändringsinitiativ och nu vill få möjlighet att arbeta mer långsiktigt och närmare verksamheten. För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du har:
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet av komplext arkitekturarbete i större organisationer
* Erfarenhet från retail, logistik, supply chain eller liknande verksamhet
* Förmåga att skapa förtroende och driva förändring genom formellt och informellt ledarskap
* Erfarenhet av både strategiskt och operativt arkitekturarbete
* God förståelse för moderna teknikplattformar, moln och datadrivna lösningar
* Förmåga att kommunicera komplexa samband på ett tydligt och pedagogiskt sätt


 Som person tror vi att du är trygg, nyfiken och självgående, samtidigt som du tycker om att samarbeta och bygga relationer med människor i hela organisationen – och förstår vad olika intressenter behöver höra, var de behöver mötas och vilka argument som tar skruv. Du trivs i att röra dig mellan långsiktiga teknikfrågor och det som påverkar här och nu och förstår värdet av ett framåtlutat och tålmodigt sätt att driva förändring och förflyttning.
   

  

 Våra arbetsspråk är svenska och engelska, och vi söker dig som är bekväm med att använda båda språken som arbetsspråk.
   

  

**Axfood IT AB gör bakgrundskontroll vid samtliga rekryteringar.** 
 Läs mer på Axfoods hemsida här: https://www.axfood.se/karriar/din-karriarvag/sa-gar-det-till-nar-du-soker-jobb-hos-oss/.
   

  

 Vår rekryteringsprocess innehåller tester, intervjuer, bakgrundskontroll och ID-kontroll. Observera att vi inte under denna rekryteringsprocess kommer be dig logga in med ditt Bank-id eller scanna någon QR-kod, men vi kommer be dig styrka din identitet i processens slutskede.
   

  

**I denna rekrytering samarbetar vi med Ada Digital och du ansöker endast via deras hemsida, här: Enterprise Architect till Axfood IT.**
**Notera att ansökningar direkt till Axfood inte kommer att behandlas.**

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Unique opportunity for a Senior Full Stack Engineer focus frontend - Perm/Hybrid - Stockholm 55.000 SEK - 70.000 SEK** 




  





 Our key account,
 **a leader in their industry with 50 years of experience** 
 , is looking for a
 **lead full stack Engineer with a frontend focus** 
 who can lead their business critical Frontend, Web- and Mobile App cross-functionally, across all teams and units and help to bring home all their platforms and tech that is currently developed and maintained by third parties.
 



  





 They know their business inside out, but they are still an unexperienced software company that is currently transforming, making you their North Start in all frontend related topics. This would include ensuring that they are choosing the right ways forward when it comes to UX/UI, their website and mobile app and understand the backend well enough to ensure continuously smooth operations.
 



  





 Technically you're be well versed in
 **TypeScript, React, React Native, Java, REST, GraphQL and APIs.** 
 Their Mobile
 **App is the main revenue generator with over 3 mio end users** 
 , is transaction heavy with geo-spatial and map data. Their customer portal is accessible via Web.
 



  





 Become the go-to expert on all matters frontend related and help recruit, mentor and coach other individuals to help take their frontend development to the next level.
 



  





**You mission:** 



* Come in and start replacing consultants on site and owning the frontend without key initiatives being stopped
* Own all frontend development end-2-end and help them to make it better
* Playing a key part in setting the mobile app strategy moving forward
* Mentor everyone else around it and own the end-2-end solutions from a frontend POV
* Drive high-level direction and improve and update work flows
* Work with product designers and managers to ensure a well integrated software



  





 Are you looking for a new role with huge impact, you in driving seat and great opportunity to develop your own career path working closely with leadership?

title: Scrum Master - Enterprise Integration
description:
*Every day, we get opportunities to make a positive impact – on our colleagues, partners, customers, and society. Together, we’re pioneering the solutions of the future and unlocking the full potential of precious resources. Trusted to act on initiative, we challenge conventional thinking to develop world-leading technologies that inspire progress in vital areas, including energy, food, water, and shipping.*

 *As we push forward, the innovative, open spirit that fuels our 140-year-old start-up culture and rapid growth also drives our personal growth. So, as we shape a more resourceful, less wasteful world, we build our careers too.*

**About the job**


The Scrum Master’s primary responsibility is assisting self-organizing, self-managing teams to achieve their goals. The Scrum Master also work with the extended Scrum Master community, including Release Train Engineers to increase the effectiveness of SAFe across the teams. In the scrum master role you will be working with Integration Hub teams.

**Responsibilities**

* Facilitates the team’s progress toward team goals
* Facilitates preparation and readiness for ART events
* Facilitates events
* Facilitates the removal of impediments and help handling risks
* Support Product Owners
* Leads team efforts in relentless improvement
* Exhibits Lean-Agile leadership
* Coordinates with other scrum masters and agile coaches.
* Enables organizational effectiveness

**Who** **are you**


You are structured and driven, with the ability to see the big picture. You are collaborative and adaptable, able to interact with all kinds of people. You also need to be comfortable in not being the subject matter expert, more focusing on driving the process with a lean agile mindset.


It is fundamental that you are interested in understanding the challenges related to integration and how to overcome them by bringing in new ideas and having an open mindset.

**What you know**


To succeed in this role, you have an interest in Computer Science. You have relevant academic background and a prior experience from IT delivery or software development, and/or an agile way of working. Experience from Microsoft Azure Devops is an advantage.

**For more information, please contact**


Silvester Napik, Manager Enterprise Integration at Silvester.Napik@alfalaval.com or Raquel Herndon, Talent Acquisition Partner at raquel.herndon@alfalaval.com

**For union information, please contact:**


Johan Ranhög, Akademikerna, johan.ranhog@alfalaval.com


Monica Anderberg, Unionen, monica.anderberg@alfalaval.com


Stefan Sandell, Ledarna, stefan.sandell@alfalaval.com

**We are conducting a continuous review of received applications.**


We do not accept applications via email, due to General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).


Please send your application no later than **June 14th, 2026**. We will remove the job advert from our website as soon as we have found the right candidate, so don't wait too long!


At Alfa Laval, we pride ourselves on creating an inclusive and dynamic workplace that values diverse perspectives and experiences. While we typically welcome applicants from all locations, for this particular role, we are prioritizing candidates who are currently residing in Lund or have an established presence in the area.

**Our commitment to integrity**  

We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioral traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games.

**As part of Alfa Laval’s commitment to a safe and healthy workplace**, we conduct background checks on final candidates for this role, and alcohol and drug testing is applied during the pre‑employment process.

**Please note that due to the summer holiday period**, the recruitment process may take longer than usual. We appreciate your patience and understanding, and we will ensure to keep candidates informed throughout the process.

**#LI-RH1**

title: Dynamics CRM Technical Architect
description:
Dynamics CRM Technical Architect
Malmö, Skåne län
**Job Summary**
---------------


Platform Specialist role supports Inter-IKEA ROSS in its strategic transformation by ensuring responsible for implementing, configuring, and supporting the DROP platform, Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations (D365 FO), and D365 Commerce. This role involves translating business requirements into functional solutions, ensuring seamless integration with other systems, and providing ongoing support and optimization.


**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------


Product team/ Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product teams and different stakeholders to gather and analyse requirements, ensuring the D365 F&O and Commerce solution meets their strategic and operational objectives.
  

  

Implementation & Configuration: Install, configure, and customize D365 F&O and Commerce modules to align with specific business needs and processes.
  

  

Support Development: Support developers to implement technical solutions, customizations, and integrations within the D365 F&O and Commerce platform. Enable and support product teams in building and launching products on the DROP platform.
  

  

Environment readiness: Setup environments (Dev/UAT/BAT/PROD) to support Product teams and different Stakeholders, also setup a process for each environment setup. Ensure that the platform is configured, installed, tested and operational.
  

  

System Integration: Ensure seamless integration of D365 F&O and Commerce with products, APIs and third-party systems. Support & Troubleshooting: Provide ongoing support, diagnose and resolve system issues, and troubleshoot tickets escalated from support teams. Also support Hype care by managing platform related incidents.
  

  

Performance Monitoring & Optimization: Monitor the system performance, implement enhancements, and execute strategies to improve overall functionality and efficiency
  

  

Data Management: Assist with Environment refresh, data migration and management strategies and ensure adherence to best practices for data handling within the ERP systems.
  

  

Power platform support: Assist on designing, developing, and maintaining custom business applications and automation workflows using Microsoft Power Apps and Power Automate, integrating them with other systems, providing technical guidance and ensuring platform governance, quality, and continuous improvement.
  

  

Security Assessment: Create and maintain the Business Impact Assessment (BIA) and Data Privacy Impact Assessment (DPIA) material for all the Platform related products along with cyber security team.


**Skill Requirements**
----------------------


Hands-on experience working with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations
  

and Commerce (D365 FO & Commerce) in enterprise or large-scale environments.
  

  

Proven experience supporting and maintaining D365 Finance & Operations and
  

Commerce.
  

  

Experience managing end-to-end platform operations, including environment
  

management, deployments, patching, and upgrades across multiple environments.
  

  

Solid understanding of D365 security model, including role-based security, duties,
  

privileges, and compliance requirements.
  

  

Hands-on experience with integrations using Data Entities, OData, DMF, and
  

Azure-based integration components.
  

  

Extensive experience managing Application Lifecycle Management (ALM),
  

including source control, branching strategies, build and release pipelines using
  

Azure DevOps.
  

  

Proven experience executing One Version (continuous update) upgrades, including impact analysis, regression testing coordination, and production rollout.
  

  

Proven experience managing environment lifecycle (DEV/TEST/UAT/PROD), including deployments, hotfixes, service updates, and regression support.
  

  

Experience on managing Microsoft Azure services such as Azure AD, Service Bus, Azure Functions, and monitoring tools.
  

  

Experience using Lifecycle Services (LCS), Commerce Scale Unit (CSU), Power platform, Azure DevOps, and CI/CD pipelines for issue tracking, releases, and
  

operational governance.
  

  

Proven ability to troubleshoot performance, stability, and data issues across Finance, Operations, and Commerce workloads.
  

  

Hands-on experience working with IT service management tools, DevOps processes, and vendor coordination


**Other Requirements**
----------------------


1.Microsoft Certified1.Dynamics 365 + Power Platform Solution Architect Expert certification is preferred

title: Solutions Architect, Software and Technology Companies (ISV)
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Are you passionate about cloud technology and helping customers innovate?  

  

Join our AWS Solutions Architecture team in Sweden and empower Software, SaaS and Technology Companies to innovate at speed and scale with cloud technologies.  

  

Solutions Architects work hand in hand with AWS customers to help them make the most of the Cloud. They are at the crossroads of business and technology and engage with organizations at all stages of cloud adoption. Solutions Architects are responsible for creating and presenting technical content and sharing best practices.  

  

They work to understand the customer's business needs and give prescriptive guidance on how to create business value with technology. They help customer's validate their initiatives from ideation to proof of concept. Solutions Architects lead activities such as architecture reviews, white-boarding sessions, demos and technical workshops. They collaborate with other teams such as account management, professional services, Industry experts, support, service teams and the AWS partner ecosystem.  

  

Amongst others you will be part of the design and building of reference architectures, proof of concepts and help customer deploy production workloads on AWS. You will also provide thought leadership and recommendations on cloud architecture, migration, modernization and operation. Build strong technical relationships acting as the voice of the customer internally to influence AWS service roadmaps.  

  

At Amazon you will be encouraged and rewarded for doing what is right for the long-term success of the customer. We value your passion to discover, invent and build on behalf of customers.  

  

Amazon has always been, and always will be, committed to diversity and inclusion. We seek builders from all backgrounds to join our teams, and we encourage our employees to bring their authentic, original, and best selves to work.  

  

AWS Global Sales drives adoption of the AWS cloud worldwide, enabling customers of all sizes to innovate and expand in the cloud. Our team empowers every customer to grow by providing tailored service, unmatched technology, and dedicated support. We dive deep to understand each customer's unique challenges, then craft innovative solutions that accelerate their success. This customer-first approach is how we built the world's most adopted cloud. Join us and help us grow.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Work directly with strategic customers to accelerate their challenging, mission-critical projects and recommend best-practice architectures in line with their long-term business outcomes
* Build technical relationships with customers and operate as their trusted advisor. The best interests of the customer will shape the guidance you provide.
* Share the voice of the customer to inform the roadmap of AWS features.
* Participate in the creation and sharing of best practices, technical content and new reference architectures (e.g. white papers, code samples, blog posts).
* Evangelise and educate customers about AWS technology (e.g. through workshops, user groups, meetups, public speaking, online videos or conferences).
* Contribute to the growth of the Solutions Architecture organisation by interviewing candidates and having a voice in hiring decisions. You will also be helping others develop new skills by mentoring team members and identifying talent needs in the organisation.
* Develop areas of depth in technical domains relevant to our outcomes.

  

A day in the life  

You will have the opportunity to work with account managers to help customers accelerate their cloud implementation to modernize their business on AWS. Working with these customers, you will help them transform existing workloads by designing modern target architectures optimized for business agility, innovation, performance, resiliency, cost, security, and more using both native and partner solutions.  

  

Our teams focus on understanding customer key business drivers as well as the existing application architecture(s) to deliver a technical recommendation to the customer with a goal of designing a robust cloud architecture that can scale as their business requires.  

  

About the team  

Our Solutions Architecture team empowers innovators to invent on behalf of customers. We are obsessed with understanding each customer's unique objectives to deliver optimal architectures tailored to their needs. Our culture celebrates talented, curious, motivated team members who take ownership of projects. We move with urgency, take risks, learn continuously, and maintain a friendly, inclusive environment. Join our team if you are passionate about technology and delighting customers.  

  

Your direct team is located across the Nordics and you would work in close collaboration with team members in Sweden and across borders.
  

  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

  

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.  

  

Mentorship & Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Background in any of the following: Cloud Architecture, Systems Design, Software Development, Infrastructure Architecture, or DevOps
* Technical Degree (Computer Science, Maths, Engineering or equivalent) and/or relevant tech experience.
* Fluent written and verbal communication skills in English
* A passion for technology and for learning

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience designing, building, refactoring or operating IT systems in the cloud
* Working knowledge of software development practices and technologies highly desired
* AWS Certification, eg. AWS Solutions Architect Associate

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Konsultuppdrag | BizTalk DevOps Engineer
description:
Start: 15/6 2026  

End: 31/12 2026


This is a Hybrid/Remote role. The team is located in Stockholm meaning that the candidate is able to come to the office once a week. However, office presence is not required for this role. If the external does not live near Stockholm, remote working (from Sweden) is also possible.

  

Our Client is looking for a skilled BizTalk DevOps engineer. For this role, extensive knowledge and experience in Biztalk is needed.  

  

Job duties  

  

Maintain integration solutions using BizTalk  

Develop build and release pipelines for BizTalk applications  

Handle incidents and perform root cause analysis for production systems  

Monitor BizTalk environments  

Perform Platform upgrades and patches  

  

The team is an agile team, organized according to several competences. In total there are 12 DevOps engineers, based from 4 different countries, meaning this is an international team (environment). The atmosphere in the team can be described as collaborative. All team members work closely every day. For this role, it's important that daily operations in BizTalk are supported. This means monitoring the ticket system and the production and monitoring of Biztalk environments.  

Skills: Mandatory Skills  

  

Proficiency in BizTalk Server Administration  

Expertise with BT360  

ITIL-based ticketing system proficiency  

Hands-on experience with Azure DevOps pipelines, GIT, YAML and PowerShell  

Strong knowledge on Windows Server and Microsoft SQL Server  

Familiarity with Azure Dashboards and Application Insights  

English speaking and writing  

  

Nice to have Skills/Soft skills  

Ability to analyze and resolve integration issues, ensuring smooth operation of the integration platform.  

Strong communication and collaboration skills in an international team  

Swedish speaking and writing  

Keywords:  

Education:  

There are no specific fields of study that are more relevant than others. Competence, skills and working experience are more important.  

If the candidate has previously worked in the energy and utilities sector, that can be seen as a positive aspect.

 **Om oss**

*Senterprise är ett ledande rekryteringsbolag inom IT och en oberoende förmedlare av frilansande konsulter. Med aktiv headhunting, search och djup teknisk förståelse hjälper vi några av Sveriges främsta arbetsgivare att hitta rätt kandidater, både för anställning och konsultuppdrag.*

*Läs vidare på* *www.senterprise.se*

title: Technical Program Manager
description:
**TL;DR:** We’re looking for a **Technical Program Manager (TPM)** to drive Lovable’s most important cross-team initiatives from idea to execution. You’ll connect engineering work with company goals, remove roadblocks, and ensure complex programs ship **on time, at quality, the first time**, freeing our tech leads and engineers to focus on building.

**Why Lovable?**
----------------


Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.


We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

  

**What we’re looking for**
--------------------------

* Proven experience driving complex technical programs across multiple engineering teams, from planning to successful delivery
* Strong technical fluency — able to understand architecture, dependencies, and engineering tradeoffs, and communicate effectively with engineers
* Exceptional execution and coordination skills — able to align stakeholders, manage ambiguity, and maintain momentum across teams
* A highly proactive operator who anticipates problems early, removes blockers, and ensures predictable progress
* Excellent communication and influence skills, with the ability to work effectively with engineers, tech leads, and leadership

 **Preferred:**

* Experience as a Senior Technical Program Manager, Staff Engineer, Engineering Manager, or similar role in a high-performing engineering organization
* Founder mindset — comfortable wearing many hats and driving initiatives end-to-end
* Experience working in fast-moving startup environments where structure needs to be created rather than followed
* Ability to speak the language of engineers and collaborate with them as a trusted partner

 **What you’ll do**

* Drive delivery of Lovable’s most important programs — cross-team initiatives that require coordination across multiple engineering teams
* Ensure predictable forward progress across complex technical projects
* Connect engineering work with company priorities, ensuring teams are aligned on goals and execution
* Identify technical dependencies, risks, and blockers early, and proactively resolve them
* Facilitate technical discussions and alignment across teams
* Draft and maintain key technical documentation such as RFCs and ADRs
* Build lightweight processes and structures that reduce friction in execution
* Remove coordination overhead from tech leads and engineers, enabling them to focus on technical work
* Step in wherever needed to keep programs moving forward

**Our tech stack**
------------------


We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:

* **Frontend**: React
* **Backend**: Golang and Rust
* **Cloud**: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* **DevOps & Tooling**: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform)


And always on the lookout for what's next!

**How we hire**
---------------

* Fill in a short form then jump on an intro call with recruiter.
* Meet the hiring team
* Show us how you approach problems during a few technical interviews.
* Tell us about your most impressive project.

 **About your application**

* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Account Executive
description:
OPENTEXT - THE INFORMATION COMPANY
  
OpenText is a global leader in information management, where innovation, creativity, and collaboration are the key components of our corporate culture. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to partner with the most highly regarded companies in the world, tackle complex issues, and contribute to projects that shape the future of digital transformation.
  
  

AI-First. Future-Driven. Human-Centered.
  
At OpenText, AI is at the heart of everything we do—powering innovation, transforming work, and empowering digital knowledge workers. We're hiring talent that AI can't replace to help us shape the future of information management. Join us.
  
  

YOUR IMPACT
  
  

As a Senior Account Executive, you will drive growth for OpenText’s Application Delivery& Management (ADM) and ValueEdge portfolio. You’ll own a defined set of enterprise customers in Sweden leading pipeline generation and complex deal execution while helping organizations modernize their software delivery and DevOps practices.
  
  

WHAT THE ROLE OFFERS
  
  

* Ownership of a defined territory and customer portfolio, with the opportunity to drive significant business growth.
* The chance to work with leading enterprise organizations as they transform their application delivery and DevOps capabilities.
* Collaboration with a high-performing extended sales team, including Pre-Sales, Professional Services, and Customer Success, to develop and execute effective opportunity and close plans.
* Exposure to a market-leading portfolio of Application Delivery Management (ADM), DevOps solutions.
* A dynamic, customer-facing role that combines strategic account management, new business development, and executive-level engagement.


WHAT YOU NEED TO SUCCEED
  
  

* Proven success in enterprise software sales, with experience managing complex sales cycles from prospecting through close.
* Experience selling Application Delivery Management (ADM), DevOps or related technology solutions is highly desirable.
* Deep understanding of customer business challenges, organizational structures, and decision-making processes.
* Strong ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels, including senior leadership and C-suite executives.
* A proactive and consultative sales approach, with a track record of driving opportunities forward and achieving results.
* Experience working with partners and leveraging broader ecosystems to support successful sales outcomes.
* Proficiency in Salesforce CRM, including pipeline management and accurate business forecasting.
* Strong knowledge of solution-based selling and the ability to articulate value in competitive environments.


ONE LAST THING
  
  

Join OpenText as aSenior Account Executive and help enterprises accelerate innovation through modern application delivery. Your expertise will enable customers to streamline value streams, improve collaboration, and stay competitive in an ever-evolving digital world.
  
  

OpenText's efforts to build an inclusive work environment go beyond simply complying with applicable laws. Our Employment Equity and Diversity Policy provides direction on maintaining a working environment that is inclusive of everyone, regardless of culture, national origin, race, color, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, family status, age, veteran status, disability, religion, or other basis protected by applicable laws.
  
If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or recruiting process, please contact us athr@opentext.com. Our proactive approach fosters collaboration, innovation, and personal growth, enriching OpenText's vibrant workplace.
company_description: A global leader in Enterprise Information Management solutions, we enable intelligent & connected enterprises and inspire new ways to work.

title: GitHub Solutions Architect
description:
**GITHUB & MICROSOFT CONSULTING****·****MULTIPLE LOCATIONS**

GitHub Solutions Architect


**Join a strategic GitHub partner and help our customers thrive by adopting modern ecosystems. Lead the way in the GitHub stack as a trusted advisor for global organizations.**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### **Welcome to Eficode!**


We are building the future of software development - specialising in AI, Security, Cloud, DevOps, Agile, and Enterprise Service Management. We’re passionate about sharing our knowledge, not just within our teams, but with the community around us as well. We invest heavily in our people, whether through conferences, training, or other growth opportunities. We believe that with the right tools and mindset, anything is possible.

### **About the role**


As our GitHub Solutions Architect, you will be driving the adoption of enterprise-grade GitHub platforms. You will own the end-to-end design and implementation of secure, scalable development workflows for some of the most influential organizations in the Nordics. You will act as an advisor, bridging the gap between high-level business requirements and hands-on technical excellence.

##### **What you’ll accomplish**


Architect the future: Design enterprise-grade GitHub architectures that align with complex business, security, and regulatory requirements


Lead global transformations: Guide customers through complex transitions from platforms like Azure DevOps, GitLab, or Bitbucket.


Technical mentorship: Elevating the standards of our GitHub practice by mentoring consultants and sharing knowledge internally.


Strategic advisory: Conducting maturity assessments and defining adoption roadmaps for executive and technical stakeholders.


Advancing security: Implementing DevSecOps principles and advanced security controls, including GitHub Advanced Security (GHAS).


### **Who we are looking for**


To thrive in this role, you need more than deep engineering roots: you also need a business-first mindset and a consultative heart.

##### **Consultative and business mindset**


Strategic advisory: You can translate business needs into sustainable technical solutions.


Commercial awareness: You look beyond delivery to identify growth opportunities and help shape scalable consulting offerings.


Pre-sales fluency: You are comfortable working with the sales team and leading technical conversations to win client trust.


Technical mentorship: You enjoy elevating others by sharing knowledge and defining technical standards.


##### **Core technic****al requirements:**

  

DevOps engineering: Solid experience in modern software delivery, with a deep understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC), cloud-native architecture, and quality gates like SonarQube.


GitHub proficiency in designing GitHub architectures and version control strategies, alongside sophisticated CI/CD automation, GHAS implementation and provide technical advisory on AI-assisted coding best practices


### **Why Eficode?**


Join a GitHub powerhouse: We have a strong partnership with GitHub.


Have a real impact: Your work directly shapes how major organizations build software, providing them with peace of mind and a competitive edge.


Contribute to a community of bright minds on all SDLC, DevOps and AI topics.


Enjoy flexibility and freedom: We offer hybrid work opportunities. While we have a vibrant culture with social events at the office, you have the freedom to shape your work-life balance.


Invest in your growth: Beyond our Efi Academy, we prioritize continuous learning and support you in your career development.



To learn more about working at Eficode, benefits and recruitment process, check our career website.

### **Ready to build with us?**


If you want to build and lead your customers to success, we encourage you to apply by submitting your CV, highlighting the projects and the industries you’ve worked on.


We're looking forward to reading you!

##### **Diversity & Inclusion**

  

At Eficode we are committed to offering an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all applicants.

*We are dedicated to creating a work environment that embraces diversity, inclusion, and respect for all employees. We believe that our differences make us better. We recognize that by having diverse perspectives, skills, ages, genders, backgrounds and cultures we will better drive our customers forward and innovate in our field.*

*To ensure a fair recruitment process, please refrain from sharing unnecessary personal information and your picture on your job application.*

##### **Salary Statement**

  

At Eficode, we believe your compensation should reflect the impact you make and how you grow along the way. Your salary develops through regular check-ins with your team lead, where we look at things like your skills, experience, client work, feedback, and overall contribution — both to your projects and to our culture. As a consultancy, it’s natural that factors like time spent on billable client work are part of the picture — but so are your development, collaboration, and everyday efforts that drive value. We also carry out a company-wide salary review once a year.

*On top of your salary, we offer a broad mix of benefits, both financial and non-financial, to support your well-being, work-life balance, and professional growth.*

##### **Beware of recruitment scams**


Eficode never asks for payment, bank details, or sensitive personal information during the recruitment process. We only communicate through official Eficode email accounts and approved recruitment platforms. If you receive an unsolicited message, job offer, or request for personal or financial information claiming to be from Eficode, it may be fraudulent.

*#LI-SB1*


  
Gothenburg - Sweden
Malmö - Sweden
Stockholm - Sweden
Southampton - UK
Łódź - Poland
Germany (Remote/Hybrid)
Aarhus - Denmark
Amsterdam - Netherlands
Copenhagen - Denmark
Helsinki - Finland
Tampere - Finland
Oslo - Norway
About Eficode
At Eficode, our goal is to empower organizations to create a software development culture that unlocks their potential. We have more people than ever before working with us, with over 580 professionals across 10 countries.
We provide customers with DevOps and Agile skills and practices, enabling them to focus on organizational growth with our Eficode ROOT Managed DevOps platform (a managed service with 50+ preferred tools including Atlassian, GitLab, GitHub, and Kubernetes), Application Management, and Atlassian services.
We help customers succeed and influence how Eficode works and how we can change the world together. We encourage all Eficodeans to make the most of their talents, learn daily, try new technologies, and grow to achieve their dreams. With the right ways of working, the right tools, and the right skill set, anything is possible.
Visit our website to learn more.

title: Solutions Engineer - Finland & Sweden
description:
##### **About the role**


As a Solutions Engineer, you’ll be at the cutting edge of SaaS data protection, collaborating with a dynamic global team. You’ll play a crucial role in shaping our product and guiding customers through advanced data protection and cyber threat recovery strategies.


**You will:**


* Deliver engaging presentations and product demonstrations both virtually and in person.
* Manage and implement Proof of Concepts (POCs) to ensure successful technical closure.
* Maintain Salesforce cadence with meticulous documentation.
* Support lead-generation initiatives, including events, webinars, and user groups.
* Collaborate with customers and partners to translate business objectives into technical solutions.
* Provide technical expertise on data protection through independent consultation with Keepit’s customers.
* Partner with the sales team to secure new clients and partners.
* Offer pre-sales support to customers evaluating Keepit's backup solution.
* Work closely with Product Management to relay customer feedback and insights.

##### **About you**


**Must-haves:**


* Familiarity with OEM, Channel, and Vendor ecosystems is highly desirable.
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment as a motivated self-starter.
* Strong time management and Excellent analytical and problem-solving capabilities.
* Managing multiple decision-makers to drive proposal outcomes.
* Ability to build and maintain positive relationships with both customers and colleagues.
* 3-5 years of proven experience in sales engineering or technical sales (pre-sales experience is a plus).
* Proficiency in Microsoft O365, including Exchange, OneDrive, Groups, Teams, SharePoint, and Dynamics, and strong understanding of Microsoft Azure (Power PI, Power Apps, DevOps, Power BI).
* Familiarity with other cloud-based SaaS applications is highly desirable and knowledge of MEDDIC or MEDPICC methodologies is beneficial.
* Willingness to travel 50-75%.

We would like to connect with you.


##### **About us**


At Keepit we deliver the next-level data protection. We own and operate a vendor-independent cloud to provide next-level SaaS data protection. We offer all-inclusive, secure, and reliable backup and recovery services for our data. We are One vender, One data processing.


We are growing fast as a company and do our best to bring our SaaS cloud-based backup services to the global audience. Our platform is designed to provide customers with an immutable historical archive of their primary data in systems such as Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Salesforce, Azure AD, Dynamics 365, and Zendesk. It aims to protect them against everything, starting from ransomware to simple accidents.


**As we collaborate across locations, English is our primary language. Please submit your CV in English to support the review process.**


*We kindly ask you not to provide us with any sensitive categories of personal data when applying for a job with us. When applying for the vacancy, Keepit will process your personal data, and therefore we recommend that you also* ***read our*** ***privacy policy****, which describes our processing of personal data and your rights as a data subject.*
