title: Head of MarTech & CRM
description:
**Company Description**
*Publicis Groupe är världens högst värderade kommunikationskoncern. Vi bygger framtidens byråmodell, utan hinder för samarbete mellan kommunikationsdiscipliner. Vi har en holistisk inställning till våra kunders utmaningar och har kraften att integrera media, data, kreativitet och teknologi i våra lösningar. Vi kallar sättet att arbeta för the Power of One.*
*Vi är stolt vinnare av flertalet priser och nomineringar, både i Sverige och internationellt. Men mest stolta är vi över att få jobba med kunder och varumärken såsom P&G, Disney, H&M, Mondelez, Volvo, VISA, Lantmännen, LEGO, Spotify, Perrigo, Renault och många fler.*
*På Publicis sätter vi människan främst. Vi är certifierade av Great Place to Work (2022, 2023, 2024, 2025) och har vunnit Diversity Charter Sweden Awards i kategorin Mental Health (2025). Vi har även tilldelats en Magnet Award för vår engagerande kultur (2023). Vi sitter i två fantastiska lokaler i* 
*Vasastan – Odengatan och Upplandsgatan – och erbjuder en flexibel arbetspolicy.*
**Overview**
 Publicis Intelligence är en del Publicis Groupes Sverige och Danmark och vi hjälper våra kunder att ta tillvara kraften i data, teknologi och AI för att skapa mätbar affärseffekt, från strategi och insikt till aktivering och optimering i kanaler.
   

  

 Vi söker nu en Head of MarTech & CRM som vill vara med och forma hur vi levererar och utvecklar vårt erbjudande inom datadriven marknadsföring. Det är en nyckelroll i vår organisation och du kommer att rapportera direkt till mig som Managing Director för Publicis Intelligence Sverige och Danmark, med ett tydligt mandat att bygga, leda och utveckla både erbjudande och team.
   

  

 Rollen passar dig som trivs i skärningspunkten mellan affär, teknik och marknadsföring och som förstår att det verkliga värdet av MarTech och CRM uppstår när data, insikter och aktivering hänger ihop med media, kreativitet och analys. Du är lika bekväm i strategiska kunddialoger på C-nivå som i tekniska diskussioner om arkitektur och dataflöden, och du har en dokumenterad förmåga att leverera transformation som faktiskt förändrar hur kunder arbetar.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Driva och utveckla Publicis Intelligence MarTech & CRM-erbjudande inklusive paketering i säljbara och skalbara tjänster för att säkerställa lönsam tillväxt. Aktivt driva nyförsäljning och merförsäljning och bidpitch och kunddialog på senior nivå.
* Agera senior rådgivare till kunder i frågor kopplade till plattformar, arbetssätt och datadriven marknadsföring, samt proaktivt identifiera nya behov och möjligheter till utökat samarbete.
* Leda och kvalitetssäkra implementations- och transformationsinitiativ inom CRM, CDP, Marketing Automation och personalisering. Fungera som primär kontaktpunkt och trusted advisor under leveransfaser. Säkerställa att lösningar är tydligt kopplade till affärsmål, KPI:er och mätbar effekt.
* Sätta riktning för hur kunddata struktureras, används och aktiveras över system och kanaler. Säkerställa att MarTech-stackar hänger ihop i praktiken, inklusive hur data delas mellan CRM, CDP, analys- och medieplattformar och prediktiva modeller och AI kan integreras i aktiveringsflöden. Driva hur data och CRM-insikter omsätts i aktivering i kanaler (egna och köpta).
* Ha teknisk förståelse för att kunna leda beslut kring arkitektur, integrationer och datalogik i dialog med specialister. Säkerställa att consent-hantering, datainsamling och GDPR-relaterade krav är korrekt implementerade och förankrade i leveranser och kunduppdrag.
* Vidare utveckla vårt arbetssätt, metodik och best practice för MarTech- och CRM-leveranser och säkerställa att dessa dokumenteras, delas och skalas internt och i kundprojekt.
* Bygga, leda och utveckla ett team med kompetens inom MarTech & CRM-strategi, implementation och aktivering. Rekrytera rätt kompetens, skapa förutsättningar för kompetensutveckling och tydliga karriärvägar inom området.
* Arbeta nära Media, Kreativitet, Analytics och Insight och vara en aktiv brygga mellan dessa kompetenser och MarTech & CRM. Rollen är därför central i att säkerställa integrerade, datadrivna erbjudanden och inte bara teknisk implementation.


**Qualifications**
* 8–12 års erfarenhet inom MarTech, CRM eller datadriven marknadsföring, varav minst 3–4 år i en senior ledande roll med erfarenhet av att leda och bygga team.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av att driva och leverera transformationsprojekt inom CRM, CDP och/eller Marketing Automation från strategi till implementation och aktivering.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med och ta beslut kring MarTech-arkitektur och integrationer, t.ex. mellan CRM, CDP, medieplattformar och analysverktyg.
* Praktisk erfarenhet av minst ett par ledande plattformar, t.ex. Salesforce, Adobe Experience Cloud, HubSpot, Braze, mParticle, Segment eller liknande.
* Erfarenhet av affärsutveckling och försäljning och att ha drivit eller aktivt bidragit till pitch, offert och nyförsäljning på senior nivå.
* Erfarenhet från byrå, konsultbolag eller tech-bolag med flera parallella kunduppdrag. Förmågan att navigera olika kunders behov och mognadsgrad är central i den här rollen. Erfarenhet från komplexa kundsegment som retail, telekom, bank/försäkring eller liknande där CRM och personalisering är affärskritiskt.


**Additional Information**
 Vi är stolta över vår inkluderande och generösa arbetsplats, där engagerade kollegor gör att du snabbt känner dig välkommen. Det här är några exempel på vad vi erbjuder dig:
   

  

**Personlig och professionell utveckling**
 Vår byråmodell Power of One ger dig tillgång till både lokala och globala utvecklingsmöjligheter. Dessutom har vi Marcel, vår globala AI plattform, som låter dig välja bland mer än 30 000 digitala kurser och nätverka med kollegor från hela världen.
   

  

**Hybrid arbetsplats**
 Vi umgås gärna med varandra på vårt fantastiska kontor men har även en flexibel work policy.
   

  

**Work Your World**
 Alla anställda har möjlighet att jobba var som helst i världen där det finns ett Publiciskontor - i upp till sex veckor per år!
   

  

**Mental hälsa**
 Att våra medarbetare mår bra är av väldigt viktigt för oss. Vi månar om en bra balans mellan arbete och privatliv, och jobbar ständigt med initiativ för att utveckla och bibehålla en god arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Förmåner**
 Konkurrensmässigt löne- och förmånspaket.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Project Planner/Engineer
description:
Description
  
At Aquatech, we tackle the challenges of water scarcity and complexity by leveraging technology, expertise, and financing to deliver comprehensive solutions that reduce carbon and recycled water footprint. As a leading global provider of water and process technology solutions, we help the world's most recognized companies achieve their sustainability and operational goals by implementing innovative approaches for water reuse, desalination, minimal and zero liquid discharge, and critical minerals recovery. Our work catalyzes the transition toward a more sustainable future and showcases our commitment to addressing water's role in climate adaptation. Learn more at www.aquatech.com
  
Aquatech has an immediate need for a full-time Project Engineer/Planner to work on our site in Boden, Sweden.
  
The ideal candidate will be organized, have excellent math skills, applied creativity, mechanical skills, problem-solving skills, team-oriented, customer service driven, and have attention to detail. This candidate will also have experience in a project-related industry.
  
Job Description
  
Review of Project specifications
  
Preparation of Project Documents
  
Maintain the Project Master document list.
  
Lead project design coordination with internal engineering departments, external engineering agencies, and Site Contractors.
  
Coordinate engineering document submissions to customers & vendors.
  
Facilitate timely engineering reviews of vendor quotes.
  
Review vendor quotes and purchase requisitions for compliance with project specifications.
  
Responsible for accurately reporting engineering progress in the project schedule.
  
Coordinate the collection of necessary inputs to the 3D model and the resolution of issue tags.
  
Provide status, control, and progress reporting support services on projects.
  
Prepare project schedules per project requirements.
  
Verify the project progress & prepare the monthly progress report.
  
Vendor follow-up & expediting
  
Periodic vendor visits to monitor the progress.
  
Attend Customer meetings as required.
  
Support correspondence with customers via the Project manager.
  
Internal communication with all departments & AIC Assembly shop.
  
Track material status in SAP & update project status
  
Preparation of packing slips & related shipment documentation
  
Site visits during the construction phase
  
Coordinate engineering responses to RFI from subcontractors
  
Expedite critical engineering solutions during the construction phase.
  
Ensure design changes are properly communicated to the project team and incorporated into the 3D model.
  
Oversee as-built documentation for the project.
  
Work autonomously without constant guidance
  
10% International and Domestic travel will be required.
  
  

**Skill Requirements:**  

Able to apply principles of logical or scientific thinking to a wide range of intellectual and practical problems.
  
Time management and organizational skills.
  
Ability to read, analyze, and interpret complex documents.
  
Ability to read and interpret AutoCAD engineering drawings and P&IDs.
  
Ability to communicate effectively with customers and maintain a positive attitude.
  
Ability to work with multiple disciplines on projects.
  
Ability to plan and manage multiple tasks or projects with attention to detail.
  
Ability to use MS Office software at a high level of proficiency.
  
Ability to use SAP.
  
Ability to use Primavera P6 preferred.
  
Experience using AutoCAD 2D and Plant 3D preferred.
  
  

**Essential Functions:**  

To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed above and below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform essential functions.
  
  

**Physical Job Demands:**  

Exerting up to 10 pounds of force occasionally and/or a negligible amount of force frequently or constantly to lift, carry, push, pull, or otherwise move objects, including the human body. Sedentary work involves sitting most of the time, limited walking, and standing.
  
  

Qualifications
  
Bachelor of Science Degree in Engineering
  
Five (5) or more years of experience in a project-related industry
  
Prior water/wastewater infrastructure project experience preferred.

title: AUTOSAR Software Development Engineer (automotive)
description:
* Permanent
* Experienced Professionals
* Software Engineering
* ID 495305-en\_US

At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.


Your role  

As a C++ Autosar Software Engineer with Capgemini, you will contribute to the development of advanced automotive systems and cutting-edge vehicle technologies. Whether you are early in your career or an experienced professional, you will work closely with industry leaders to design and implement solutions that enhance safety, performance, and user experience.  

  

 *In this role you will play a key role in:*  

* Designing and developing Autosar based embedded software solutions in C++ for automotive applications
* Implementing and testing system-level functionalities with a focus on safety and reliability
* Collaborating in agile teams to deliver high-quality software aligned with industry standards
* Supporting troubleshooting and integration during launch phases

  

Your profile  

* Strong programming skills in C/C++ and experience in system software design (2+ years preferred)
* Strong Experience with AUTOSAR, embedded systems architecture, and agile methodologies
* Hands-on experience with Unix/Linux environments, GIT, CI tools, and test automation
* Fluency in English; Swedish language skills are highly meriting
* European B license is a plus

  

What we believe you will enjoy about working here  

* A dynamic environment where innovation and collaboration drive success
* Opportunities to work with leading automotive brands and cutting-edge technologies
* Continuous learning and career development supported by a global network of experts

  

Application  

As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.
About Capgemini  

Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.


Make it real | www.capgemini.com
company_description: Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value.

title: Project Engineer to ABB Ports
description:
At **ABB**, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.

**This position reports to:**


Engineering Manager
\_\_

**Your role and responsibilities**


In this role you will develop software for automatic crane systems and have the possibility to learn product development. We also see strong potential for this position to grow into a more leading role, with increased direct communication with customers, customer demands, and project responsibilities. You will create and modify the standard designs of equipment, systems, or installations, including standard specifications for manufacturing, fabrication or construction for assignments classified as low to medium complexity by applying standard design concepts.


You will be mainly accountable for:

* Design, develop, and maintain PLC software solutions for crane automation systems.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of software components.
* Optimize code for performance, reliability, and safety.
* Analyze system specifications and hardware schematics to ensure alignment with project requirements.
* Identify potential issues and propose improvements to enhance system functionality.
* Conduct thorough testing and validation of PLC code to verify correctness and adherence to standards.
* Debug and troubleshoot any issues during the testing phase.
* Communicate progress and potential delays to stakeholders.

**Qualifications for the role**

* You hold an engineering degree in computer science or an equivalent field.
* You have practical experience in Codesys and/or C programming. Your proficiency in these languages enables you to develop efficient and reliable PLC software.
* Your skills extend to algorithm development. You can design and optimize algorithms to enhance system performance and responsiveness.
* Being self-organized and structured is essential for success in this role. You excel at managing tasks, meeting deadlines, and maintaining clear documentation.
* Your familiarity with ABB PLC Development Tools positions you well for this position. Additionally, your understanding of ABB automatic crane functionality gives you an edge.
* Previous experience in product development is considered a merit.
* Your insights into the product lifecycle and iterative development processes contribute to successful outcomes.
* You are proficient in both English and Swedish at a professional level.

**What’s in it for you?**

We empower you to take initiative, challenge ideas, and lead with confidence. You’ll grow through meaningful work, continuous learning, and support that’s tailored to your goals. Every idea you share and every action you take contributes to something bigger.

**More about us**

You will be part of the Ports business line within the Marine and Ports division that is specialized in advanced automation and information systems for all types of container and bulk cargo handling cranes, as well as OCR and electrical systems for container terminals. We offer an international and dynamic working environment where our business delivers advanced technology on large projects across the world in a customer oriented and highly globalized industry.


Recruiting Manager: Henrik Nordin, +46 73 448 14 58, will answer your questions about the position. Union representatives - Sveriges Ingenjörer: Johan Halling, +46 72-461 25 17, Unionen: Pär Ångbäck, +46 70-636 07 04, Ledarna: Olof Kvensler, +46 70-588 91 52. Talent Partner: Anna Nordlund


We look forward to reading your application in PDF format. Last day to apply is June 17. Please note that the interview process is ongoing, apply now to secure your spot in the recruitment process!


Please note that to be eligible for employment at ABB Sweden, you will need to pass our pre-employment screening steps. This includes a reference check, a drug test, and could also include an extended background check.


We kindly decline direct contact with staffing and recruitment agencies as well as sellers of additional job advertisements.


Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. That's why we welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.




Ready to make an impact?


Apply today or visit **https://www.abb.com** to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Senior Test Engineer – Command and control
description:
*Would you like to develop future test practices and engage in solving test matters in ongoing projects? Look at this job!*

  

Your role


Command and Control is growing and we are putting more efforts into the test and verification area. This is a position for a senior test engineer in the integration and verification (I&V) team. You will be a part of our journey to grow and develop ways of working so that we can manage to deliver successfully and efficiently in our projects and product programs.


To work as a senior test engineer within Command and Control, means you have to understand system behavior and performance. Your responsibility includes planning and leading the work for specific projects and coordinating this work with project managers and team leads. The role also includes participating in the department test forum that includes representatives from all development teams as well as the integration and verification team in order to share knowledge and inspire to improved test practice.

  

Product presentation: https://www.saab.com/products/giraffe-c4i


Other tasks are:

* Systems integration, verification and validation
* Maintain and develop a common workflow regarding Integration and Verification, from both a product and project perspective
* For certain projects, take part in test activities and administer, review and release test documents


Your profile


To succeed in this role, you are a self-motivated person used to efficiently collaborating with team members as well as other stakeholders. You have several years of experience from working as a test engineer within the area of complex system development.


You are a structured person with the ability to prioritize. You take responsibility to deliver result and work proactively. Your passion lies in finding the best ways of working and you have the ability to challenge status quo and seek out new perspectives. You should know what it takes to develop software with quality and on-time.


You are a good communicator, fluent in Swedish and English, both verbally and in writing and have experience from coaching agile teams in complex environments.


Required skills:

* Bachelor degree or work experience in similar roles and tasks
* Several years of experience from working with software test (including automation) and QA
* Experience from test planning
* Experience in analyzing test results, improvements, fault tracing and root cause analysis
* Excellent communication skills in Swedish and English, verbal and written


Desired skills:

* Experiences from programming (preferably in Java)
* Knowledge of and Jira and Zephyr
* Knowledge of Linux
* Experience from SW and HW development
* Understanding of requirement and compliance work
* Experience from working in agile teams

*This position requires that you pass a security vetting based on the current regulations around/of security protection and that you hold a Swedish citizenship.*


What you will be a part of


Explore a wealth of possibilities. Take on challenges, create smart inventions, and grow beyond. This is a place for curious minds, brave pioneers, and everyone in between. Together, we achieve the extraordinary, each bringing our unique perspectives. Your part matters.


Saab is a leading defense and security company with an enduring purpose, to help nations keep their people and society safe. Empowered by its 28,000 talented people, Saab constantly pushes the boundaries of technology to create a safer and more sustainable world.


Saab designs, manufactures and maintains advanced systems in aeronautics, weapons, command and control, sensors and underwater systems. Saab is headquartered in Sweden. It has major operations all over the world and is part of the domestic defense capability of several nations. Read more about us here
company_description: Saab serves the global market with world-leading products, services and solutions from military defense to civil security.

title: Design Engineer Software
description:
**Are you ready to take the next step in your engineering career? We are looking for a Software Engineer to join our Global Tissue Services automation engineering team.**
==========================================================================================================================================================================

At Valmet, we are shaping the future of sustainable solutions through innovation, collaboration, and a seamless lifecycle approach. Join us as we move forward with our renewed strategy to Lead the Way. This means pioneering smarter technologies, expanding our service capabilities, and delivering customer value across the entire lifecycle, from raw material to finished product. If you're ready to make a real impact in a dynamic, future-focused environment, we invite you to grow with us.


In this role, you will work with automation systems for tissue machine modernization projects in a global and collaborative environment. Your daily work will consist of diverse and technically challenging tasks, where you will have the opportunity to take initiative, contribute to customer performance improvements, and support the continuous development of our technologies and ways of working. Your work will include software engineering, testing, commissioning, training, and start-up activities, while contributing to both customer performance and the continuous development of our technologies and ways of working. As a software engineer, you will primarily work with Valmet DNA tools, while also having the opportunity to broaden your expertise with Siemens PLCs and Pilz safety controllers when needed.  

  



The position is located in Karlstad. International travel is part of the role, offering opportunities for hands-on impact and global collaboration.  

  



**Your main responsibilities**
------------------------------

* Design and develop automation system software (PLC/DCS) and produce the related documentation.
* Timely completing engineering activities with respect to delivery time, hourly budget and the target cost.
* Support mechanical and process engineering teams in solution selection.
* Support the sales team by providing expertise and answers to software engineering‑related questions.
* Support procurement team if needed to evaluate suppliers and brands.
* Participate in FAT and start-ups.
* Participate in commissioning, testing and starting up of equipment.

**What do we expect from you?**
-------------------------------

* B.Sc or M.Sc degree in automation engineering or equivalent experience
* More than five years of experience in a similar role
* Experience with PLC/DCS systems (e.g. Valmet DNA, Siemens, Allen-Bradley)
* Industry knowledge
* Experience with Eplan/CADS is an additional advantage
* Proficiency in Swedish and English
* Self-driven and collaborative mindset
* Willingness to travel 0-80 days per year

**What can you expect from us?**
--------------------------------

In return, we offer you an exciting and rewarding role in a global industry-leading company, supported by Valmet’s extensive international network. You will work in a collaborative and forward-thinking environment where innovation, sustainability, and continuous improvement are at the core of everything we do. As part of our team, you will have the opportunity to contribute to meaningful projects, develop your expertise, and grow professionally in an international setting with strong support throughout your career journey. Our onboarding process and dedicated team will support and guide you as you start in your new role.


**Want to know more?**
----------------------

Did we catch your interest? If yes, please join our team and send your application via the link provided as soon as possible but no later than **July 1, 2026** . For further information about the position, please contact Jussi Peltomäki Manager, Automation Engineering, Tissue Machines Services Jussi.peltomaki@valmet.com . Please note that we will not accept applications by
  

e-mail.  

  



We perform background checks and alcohol and drug testing for all employees, in line with our commitment to a safe and secure workplace.  

  



### ***When everything works together***

### ***Valmet is where the best talent from a wide variety of backgrounds comes together. With over 19,000 professionals around the world, we are the leading global developer and supplier of technologies, automation and services for the pulp, paper and energy industries, and serve an even wider base of process industries with our automation systems and flow control solutions. Our commitment to moving our customers’ performance forward requires creativity, technological innovations, service know-how – and above all, teamwork.***

### ***Join the team!*** ***www.valmet.com/careers***
company_description: Valmet has extensive technological know-how and a broad process understanding in solution related to the pulp, paper and energy industries.

title: Senior Mechatronic Engineer
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**  

We are looking for a Senior Mechatronic/Mechanical Engineer to join a collaborative engineering team working on complex, high-performance machine systems. This is a hands-on, end-to-end development role where you will contribute across the full product lifecycle — from early concept and system design through testing, validation, and final implementation.


The team works in a highly interdisciplinary environment, combining mechanics, electronics, and software to develop robust machine systems. In this role, you will work at the intersection of mechanical design and embedded control, contributing to both new product development and ongoing platform evolution. You will help define system architecture, ensure seamless integration, and participate in hands-on testing and troubleshooting in real-world environments.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Develop and maintain machine and functional system architectures.
* Design, integrate, and support embedded control systems and vehicle/machine communication networks.
* Perform data collection, telemetry analysis, and physical performance evaluation.
* Contribute to functional safety activities, risk assessments, and system compliance.
* Drive mechanical development using modern 3D CAD tools.
* Support system modeling, controls engineering, and simulation using MATLAB/Simulink.
* Collaborate closely with cross-functional engineering disciplines (Software, Electrical, Testing).

**Requirements:**

* Minimum 5+ years of proven experience in mechanical, mechatronic, or heavy-equipment product engineering.
* Ability to independently lead complex technical assignments and drive solutions.
* Strong experience across several of the following areas:


	+ Machine/system architecture design
	+ Embedded control systems and standard industrial bus networks (e.g., CAN bus protocols)
	+ Functional safety standards
	+ CAD-based mechanical design
	+ MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and simulation
	+ Data analysis, physical testing, and system validation
* Professional fluency in both English and Swedish (the primary working environment).
* Analytical, structured, and solution-oriented mindset.
* Curious, with a deep interest in how complex machinery and electromechanical systems operate.
* Highly comfortable working hands-on with practical engineering challenges in a workshop or testing environment.
* Proactive, collaborative, and able to adapt smoothly across different product and subsystem areas.

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace, driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and a comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Field Service Engineer - Sweden
description:
**Oxford Instruments Plasma Technology**

Are you passionate about cutting-edge technology and want to work at the forefront of scientific innovation? Join **Oxford Instruments**, a global leader enabling breakthrough discoveries at the atomic and molecular level.

With over **60 years of innovation** and **14 Queen’s Awards for Enterprise**, we are trusted by the world’s leading industrial companies and research institutions to tackle some of the biggest challenges of the 21st century.

**About the Role**

Our **Plasma Technology** division is growing, and we’re looking for a **Customer Support Engineer** to join our team in Sweden.

In this dynamic, **field-based role**, you’ll play a vital part in ensuring our advanced systems perform flawlessly at customer sites across Sweden—and occasionally across the Nordic region. If you enjoy problem-solving, travelling, and working with world-class technology, this is the role for you.

**What You’ll Be Doing**

As a trusted expert and key customer contact, you will:
* Install, maintain, and upgrade advanced plasma processing systems and software
* Support customers directly on-site, ensuring maximum equipment uptime and performance
* Collaborate with technical teams to troubleshoot and resolve complex issues
* Provide clear, detailed service reports after each visit
* Support the technical helpdesk when needed
* Track and report system performance and issues through internal systems
* Manage expenses and ensure accurate documentation

**What We’re Looking For**

You’ll thrive in this role if you have:
* A qualification in **Electrical, Electronic, or Mechatronics Engineering (HNC or higher)**
* Proven **field service experience**
* Experience in **semiconductor or high-tech industries** (highly desirable)
* Ability to read and interpret **electrical and mechanical drawings**
* Strong **PC/PLC skills** (preferred)
* Fluency in **Swedish and English**
* A **full driving licence**
* A proactive, independent mindset with excellent communication skills
* The flexibility to travel extensively

**What We Offer**

We believe in supporting our people as much as they support our customers:
* Company car
* Home office & flexible working hours
* ️ 30 days paid annual leave
* Continuous learning via LinkedIn Learning & development programmes
* Language courses
* Regular team events and a collaborative culture
* Competitive corporate benefits

**Why Join Oxford Instruments?**

At Oxford Instruments, you’re not just taking a job—you’re joining a team shaping the future. From nanotechnology to advanced materials, your work will help drive innovation across industries that matter.

**Ready to make an impact? Apply now and be part of something extraordinary.**  



All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, or disability. We encourage applications from people of all backgrounds and would ask you to get in touch if you are concerned about any barriers you feel you may be facing in your application process with us.  


**Note to recruitment agencies:** Oxford Instruments operates a Preferred Supplier List, and we do not accept unsolicited agency CVs. Please do not forward candidate details in response to this advert, or to any Oxford Instruments employees or other company locations. Oxford Instruments is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited CVs.

title: ML Engineer
description:
**Professional Galaxy** is an IT and technology consulting company that provides highly specialized expertise within IT, software development, SAP, purchasing, electronics and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic value-creating expertise to some of Sweden's most complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism and clear, measurable results.


We are now seeking an **ML Engineer** for one of our clients.

**About the assignment:**


ML engineer - Maps Data Systems  

  

Description  

In this role, you will design and build machine learning systems and perform data analysis to improve the quality of large-scale geospatial datasets. You will develop both classical machine learning and NLP models to extract structured information, detect anomalies, and measure data quality.  

You will be involved end-to-end—from experimentation and model development to integration, productionization, and deployment at scale. This role requires a strong combination of data science expertise and solid software engineering skills.  

  

Responsibilities  

Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models  

Build and maintain scalable data and software solutions  

Apply data science techniques to generate insights and improve data quality  

Own and deliver features and improvements end-to-end  

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate models into production systems  

  

Must-have Qualifications  

Strong programming skills, with extensive experience in Python  

Proven experience in machine learning and data science (e.g., classification, clustering, feature engineering, anomaly detection, neural networks)  

Experience working with LLMs, including prompting and agent-based workflows  

Solid understanding of classical ML algorithms (e.g., SVM, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, k-NN)  

Experience with ML frameworks and libraries such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, NumPy, and Pandas  

Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills  

Ability to balance creativity with practical delivery in existing systems  

Excellent written and verbal communication skills  

Proactive, ownership-driven mindset with the ability to adapt and deliver in a fast-paced environment  

  

Extra Merit Qualifications  

Experience with Scala or Java  

Knowledge in one or more of the following areas: NLP, information retrieval, data mining  

Experience in statistical modeling and building predictive models

 **Additional information**  

  

**Assignment start:** 2026-06-30

**Remote work:** No

**Assignment duration:** 1 year

**Geographical region:** Sweden\Skåne län, \Malmö (MALMÖ)

**Reply no later than:** 2026-06-30


Are you the right person for the assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Do not hesitate to contact us.


Please apply directly through our system with:

* Your updated CV in english
* Availability to start the assignment


In the motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment - refer to previous consulting assignments, employmxent, education and personal qualities.

**Please note:** We do not accept any applications through mail. All applications have to be sent through the portal to be valid.

**Offer continuously:** Please note that for this role we offer continuously. That means that we sometimes remove the assignments before the deadline. If you are interested, we recommend that you apply immediately.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description:
Humans since 1982 is a Swedish contemporary art and design studio operating at the intersection of art, design, and technology. Our signature series, ClockClock and A million Times, are internationally recognized and collected by some of the world’s most prestigious collectors, museums, luxury brands, and leading companies.

**About the role:**


Tech support at Humans since 1982 is an adventure. You will work directly in our studio and manufacturing line, supporting artworks made entirely in-house in Sweden, and collaborate closely with the design team on how they move and behave.


Our clients are not typical—they are collectors, institutions, and brands shaping culture globally. We create for those who shape the world, which sets a high bar for everything we do.


You will play a key role in making sure our artworks continue to tick—overseeing and fine-tuning animations, and safeguarding the precision and quality that define our work. Your responsibility is not only to fix issues, but to ensure that every piece continues to deliver the fascination and wonder our collectors expect over time.

**On any given day, you may be:**

* Troubleshooting support cases and verifying possible solutions in the studio to prove your theories
* Configuring, installing, and testing software on artworks
* Developing small fixes and improvements and documenting your work processes
* Coordinating with colleagues, customers and support partners (sometimes across time zones) to manage customer needs
* Assisting developers with troubleshooting hardware issues, such as broken PCB boards and understanding the root cause
* Monitor support cases and analyze trends in issue types for regular feedback to development
* Maintaining clear documentation of each case and ensuring consistent communication with internal teams
* Supporting and maintaining the studio’s internal IT setup, including networks, servers, and account management
* You will also master the animation software tool for the timebase artworks and continuously improve the movements and build new animations

**We believe that you have:**

* A technical post-secondary education (or equivalent hands-on experience)
* Experience working in technical support, service, or other customer-facing role
* Practical experience with electronics, working with components, cables, circuit boards, ESD safety, soldering.
* A good understanding of networks and how systems communicate (e.g. CAN bus, USB, WiFi, Ethernet)
* Experience working with Linux-based systems along with a general understanding of server environments and system configuration
* Basic programming skills (e.g. Python or similar)
* Fluent in English (required), Swedish is a plus, and additional languages are beneficial
* A curious and hands-on approach to problem solving, with an interest in learning new technologies


This is a hands-on role, so you should be comfortable working from our Stockholm studio. We’re looking for someone curious, responsible, and committed for the long term—your work will directly impact the quality and precision of our artworks.

**What we offer:**

* Competitive salary
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Wellness allowance
* A unique opportunity to work at the intersection of art, design, and technology—rare in Sweden
* Rapid career development in a high-end, globally recognized studio

**Culture at Humans since 1982**


At Humans since 1982, we operate in a niche of luxury collectible design and art, where exclusivity, high precision, and uncompromising quality are essential—and where every piece is designed to bring fascination.


We value ownership and high standards. You are expected to take initiative, think critically, and contribute beyond your immediate scope. Collaboration is key, but so is independent execution.


We move fast and build with an entrepreneurial mindset, while maintaining the level of precision and craftsmanship our work demands. As we grow, every team member plays a direct role in shaping both the work we create and the culture we build.

title: Senior Java Software Engineer
description:
**Senior Java Software Engineer** 




  





**Om Alira Consulting Group** 




 Alira Consulting Group är ett konsultbolag inom IT. Vi matchar företag med marknadens mest specialiserade och erfarna IT-konsulter och hjälper våra kunder att hitta rätt kompetens snabbt med fokus på kvalitet, tempo och långsiktiga relationer.

 Vi söker en driven och erfaren senior Javautvecklare för långsiktiga uppdrag hos etablerade kunder i Stockholm. Du är en tekniskt stark utvecklare med djup kompetens inom backend, men tillräckligt bred för att bidra över hela stacken när det behövs. Du trivs i komplexa och säkerhetskritiska miljöer och tar naturligt ett tekniskt ledarskap i agila team.

title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
description:
The role of the embedded software developer is to design, develop and maintain the software for our optical communication systems, and contribute to the continuous improvement work of the R&D team.
 



  





**Introduction** 




 Smartoptics provides innovative optical networking solutions for a new era of open networking. We focus on solving network challenges and increasing the competitiveness of our customers. Our customer base includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments and thousands of enterprises.
 



  





 The candidate will be part of the R&D team, developing complete systems including both hardware and software.
 



  





**Position summary** 




 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for a senior C++ developer. You will be designing features and applications for embedded systems in our range of fiber optical communication products. Your primary responsibility will be to design and develop these applications, and to coordinate with the rest of the team working on different layers of the infrastructure. We are working agile according to the SAFe methodology, in teams of 5-8 people consisting of software and hardware developers, system testers and Scrum masters. Some possibility for work from home, but most days we try to meet in our office in Kista, Stockholm.
 



  





**Requirements:** 



* Based in the Stockholm area
* Office-first policy
* University degree in relevant field, e.g. MSc in Electrical Engineering or Computer Science
* Good communication skills in English, preferably also in Swedish
* Strong proficiency in Modern C++, with fair knowledge of the language specification and 3+ years of experience of hardware related C++ development
* Thorough knowledge of the standard library, containers, and algorithms
* Good understanding of memory management in non-garbage collected environments
* Understanding of hardware and embedded system design, Embedded Linux and Yocto



  





**Desired skills:** 



* Experience in the telecoms sector and knowledge of optical transceivers
* Experience with network technologies (IP, Ethernet, DWDM)
* Experience with SDN (software-defined network) architectures and related protocols (e.g. RESTCONF, NETCONF and gNMI)
* Strong teamwork and communication skills
* Good problem-solving skills
* Good troubleshooting and debugging skills
* Knowledge of agile development



  





 Smartoptics R&D team is located in Kista with head office in Oslo, Norway. Benefits include pension, health insurance, bonus scheme, 6 weeks’ vacation and flexible working hours. For more information about Smartoptics, please see
 
 smartoptics.com/about
 
 .
 



  





 Furthermore, note that you must have a Swedish/EU work permit. No relocation assistance or visa support provided. No recruiters or agencies, please.
 



  





**About Smartoptics** 




 Smartoptics is a Scandinavian company founded in 2006. We provide innovative optical networking solutions for the new era of open networking. Our focus is on solving network challenges and enhancing the competitiveness of our customers. Our clientele includes cable and telecom operators, cloud providers, Internet exchanges, governments, and thousands of enterprises.
 



  





 At Smartoptics, we value inclusivity and prioritize the well-being of our employees. We foster a positive company culture and provide a supportive work environment.

title: Senior Software Engineer – Imaging & High Performance Systems
description:
Vill du arbeta med avancerad produktutveckling där bilddata, algoritmer, mjukvara och fysik möts?
 



 Vi söker nu en senior ingenjör till ett högteknologiskt produktbolag som utvecklar världsledande system med extrema krav på precision, prestanda och kvalitet. Rollen passar dig som vill arbeta nära både mjukvara och hårdvara i komplexa system där tekniska utmaningar står i fokus.
 



  





**OM TJÄNSTEN:** 




 Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt utvecklingsteam som arbetar med avancerad data- och bildbehandling i system där noggrannhet, prestanda och stabilitet är avgörande.
 



 Arbetet spänner över hela produktutvecklingskedjan – från idé och prototyp till färdig produkt. Du kommer att arbeta med utveckling av algoritmer, optimering av prestanda, analys av stora datamängder samt utveckling av mjukvara i nära samspel med hårdvara, elektronik och optik.
 



  





**ARBETSUPPGIFTER:** 



* Utveckla och optimera algoritmer för bildanalys och databehandling
* Arbeta med prestandakritiska system och parallelliserad databehandling
* Bearbeta och analysera bilddata mot referenser med höga noggrannhetskrav
* Utveckla mjukvara i bl.a. C, C++ och Java
* Arbeta nära hårdvara (datorer, optik, elektronik), operativsystem och komplexa systemmiljöer
* Mäta, analysera och optimera systemprestanda
* Samarbeta tätt med team, interna stakeholders och internationella kollegor



  





**VI SÖKER DIG SOM HAR ERFARENHET AV FLERA AV FÖLJANDE OMRÅDEN:** 



* Computer Vision eller bildbehandling
* Algoritmutveckling
* Signalbehandling
* Sensorbaserade system
* GPU-programmering, CUDA eller annan parallellisering
* Embedded Linux eller systemnära utveckling
* C/C++-utveckling
* Prestandaoptimering i komplexa system



  





**VEM ÄR DU:** 




 Vi tror att du drivs av att förstå och lösa komplexa tekniska problem. Du trivs i miljöer där mjukvara, data och fysisk verklighet möts och uppskattar att arbeta med produkter där prestanda, precision och kvalitet är avgörande.
 



  





 Du är nyfiken, samarbetsorienterad och tycker om att omsätta idéer till fungerande lösningar tillsammans med andra ingenjörer.
 



  





**OM TEAMET OCH ERBJUDANDET:** 




 Du blir en del av ett tvärfunktionellt team med kompetens inom utveckling, test, DevOps och systemdesign. Teamet arbetar med komplexa, kundkritiska system där varje leverans har stor betydelse.
 



  





 Här får du arbeta i en tekniskt avancerad miljö med unika produkter, där kombinationen av mjukvara, hårdvara och fysik skapar spännande utmaningar varje dag. Kulturen präglas av öppenhet, samarbete och en vilja att ständigt förbättra både produkter och arbetssätt.
 



  





**Om anställningen:** 




 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag vilket innebär att du kommer att vara anställd av Friday och arbeta som konsult ute hos vår kund. Vår och kunds ambition är att du efter tid ska bli direktanställd på bolaget.
 



  





**Övrig info:** 



* Omfattning: Heltid
* Start: Enligt överenskommelse
* Placering: Stockholm/Täby
* Rekryteringsansvarig: Hedvig Svärd
* Lön: Fast månadslön



  





 Ansök genom att klicka på länken nedan. Kom ihåg att vara snabb med din ansökan då vi gör löpande urval av kandidater och att annonsen kan stängs ner innan tjänsten är tillsatt om vi gått över till urvals och intervjufasen. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail.
 



  





**Om Friday:** 




 På Friday hjälper vi Tech-talanger att hitta roller där de trivs, utvecklas och gör skillnad. Genom att lyssna på vad just du vill och drivs av, matchar vi dig med företag och möjligheter som får dig att se fram emot att gå till jobbet. Vi värderar ambition och potential högt och arbetar aktivt för en fördomsfri rekrytering, där alla ges samma chans att lyckas. Vi finns i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Linköping och Örebro. Varje år genomför vi över 5 000 karriärmöten och matchar kandidater med allt från globala företag till innovativa startups.
 



  





 Sökord: Computer Vision, Image Processing, Algorithms, GPU/CUDA, High Performance Systems, C++, Linux, Sensor Systems, Advanced Imaging

title: AI Engineer
description:
Senior AI/ML‑specialist – Fokus på LLM & Generativ AI
 



 Vill du arbeta med nästa generation av AI‑lösningar och bidra till att utveckla avancerade språkmodeller för verksamhetskritiska processer? Vi söker nu en erfaren specialist inom stora språkmodeller (LLM) och generativ AI.
 



  





 Om uppdraget
 



 Uppdraget fokuserar på djup specialistkompetens inom träning, anpassning och finjustering av stora språkmodeller i kombination med modern mjukvaruutveckling. Du kommer att arbeta med att utveckla skräddarsydda AI‑lösningar där generella modeller inte är tillräckliga, med särskilt fokus på edge‑miljöer med höga krav på säkerhet och prestanda.
 



 Rollen kan innebära både specialistbidrag och resursförstärkning i ett befintligt team. Den dagliga styrningen av arbetet sker inom uppdragsorganisationen.
 



  





 Ansvarsområden
 



 Du kommer bland annat att:
 


* Genomföra supervised fine‑tuning av LLM:er baserat på domänspecifik data
* Arbeta med modelloptimering för edge‑miljöer (t.ex. via CUDA, Docker, kvantisering och pruning)
* Utvärdera och jämföra modellprestanda genom benchmarks och interna testmetoder
* Bygga och vidareutveckla robusta pipelines för deployment i resurssnåla miljöer
* Samarbeta nära domänexperter kring datainsamling, modellträning och KPI‑definition
* Dokumentera arbetssätt, kod och resultat på ett strukturerat och återanvändbart sätt



 🔧 Kravprofil
 



  





 Vi söker dig som har:
 


* Erfarenhet av fine‑tuning och reinforcement learning av stora språkmodeller
* Goda kunskaper i Python, PyTorch, LoRA samt arbete i t.ex. Jupyter Notebook
* Praktisk erfarenhet av CI/CD, Git, Docker och CUDA‑acceleration
* Förståelse för edge‑deployment, modelloptimering och säkerhetskrav i produktionsmiljö
* Stark dokumentationsförmåga och vana att arbeta enligt best practice
* Mycket god kommunikations- och samarbetsförmåga



  





 Meriterande
 


* Erfarenhet av dynamiska AI‑arbetsflöden och avancerad modellfinjustering
* Tidigare arbete i miljöer med höga säkerhetskrav

title: Senior Python Engineer- Data Extraction
description:
**About The Data Extraction Team**
 Our Document Extraction team turns unstructured financial content into reliable, structured knowledge. We work with financial filings, earnings call slide decks and earnings call transcripts.
   

  

 The goal is not just to pull text off a page, but to understand what a document means, structure it cleanly, and produce knowledge that downstream teams and products can trust.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Engineer to own the extraction and structuring pipelines end to end. You will design the systems that ingest messy, real-world documents and output accurate, well-modeled data at scale. This is a hands-on engineering role with deep ownership, suited to someone who is equally comfortable building robust pipelines and reasoning about data quality.
   

  

**Required Technical Skills**
* 5+ years of professional experience as a backend engineer with a focus on Python
* Hands-on experience with NLP and large language models, including prompting, fine-tuning, or retrieval-based approaches.
* Practical experience with document AI, OCR, or information extraction from PDFs and other unstructured formats.
* Experience designing data schemas and building pipelines that produce structured, validated output.


 Preferred technical skills
   

  

* Knowledge of ETL processes and data engineering workflows for data ingestion
* Solid backend architecture skills for creating scalable and maintainable systems
* Experience working with AWS
* Proficiency with Docker for managing and deploying backend services
* What We Offer
* Competitive salary
* Top-notch equipment of your choice
* Wellness allowance
* Flexible work arrangements (remote or on-site in Stockholm/Gothenburg) – must be based in Sweden with a valid work permit
* Employee pension (Tjänstepension)


**Note:** 
 We are not seeking assistance from consultants or recruitment agencies.
   

  

**About Quartr**
 Every day, leading companies and financial institutions worldwide rely on Quartr to make better decisions faster. The product suite includes: Quartr API, enabling third parties to build custom solutions powered by Quartr's unique live earnings calls and transcription technology, and its extensive global database of IR material – including public company filings, archived earnings call transcripts, and slide deck presentations. Quartr Pro, a desktop research platform that increases efficiency and precision in qualitative public market research for top hedge funds, asset managers, equity research departments, and IR professionals. A free mobile app allowing users to always stay informed and conduct research anytime, anywhere.

title: Senior Java Backend Developer
description:
**Title: Senior Java Backend Developer** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid)** 




**Employment Contract.** 




  





**Job Description:** 




**Mandatory skills\* 8+ Years Exp.** 




 o Experience in telecommunication domain.
 



 o technical expertise
 



 o Tech: Java, Spring Boot, JBoss Wild Fly, Apache Artemis, Apache Kafka, REST APIs, Event driven architecture
 



 o Database: MySQL, Amazon RDS, OpenSearch, Data Modeling, Query Optimization, Indexing
 



 o SRE: Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, Open Telemetry, Monitoring, Tracing, Alerting
 



 o IAM (Platform aligned): Azure Entra ID, Authentication, Authorization, RBAC, SSO
 



 o Traffic Layer: Apache HTTP Server, NGINX, Reverse Proxy, Load Balancing
 



  





**Desired skills\*** 




 • Proven experience in developing Java, Spring Boot
 



 • Familiar with latest trends in industry from technology and domain standpoint
 



 • Experience and good understanding of IT SDLC lifecycle phases. Through understanding Agile principles and practices
 



 • Strong business process/system analytical skills
 



 • Excellent oral and written communication skills with ability to interact with technical and functional staff at all levels.
 



 • Creative, innovative, and able to work in a fast-paced environment
 



 • Team Player
 



 • Experience and desire to work in a Global delivery environment.
